feats.description: A lifetime of experience helps you see through disguises.

feats.name: Share Thoughts
feats.description: You have an uncanny knack of communicating with other elves without speaking, though this habit that is often uncomfortable to observers.

feats.name: Shiny Button Eyes
feats.description: You've polished your eyes to reflect the smallest details in dimmest light.

feats.name: Shisk Lore
feats.description: You hoard knowledge like a dragon hoards gold. You gain the trained proficiency rank in three Lore skills of your choice. You also become trained in Shisk Lore.

feats.name: Shoony Lore
feats.description: Growing up in shoony society, you learned the value of honesty, friendship, and hard work, even during trying times.

feats.name: Shrouded Magic
feats.description: Choose one cantrip from the occult spell list. You can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will, heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Shrouded Mien
feats.description: You're used to dealing with dangerous situations and sinister creatures.

feats.name: Silent Stone
feats.description: You've lived in the shadow of the Shattered Range, and the patience of those ancient mountains expresses itself in your stillness.

feats.name: Sinister Appearance
feats.description: You possess horns, a tail, or red eyes, or could otherwise be mistaken for a tiefling.

feats.name: Skilled Herbalist
feats.description: You've been taught how to craft healing remedies with a variety of herbs and plants.

feats.name: Skittertalk
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with spiders and other arachnids. The GM determines which creatures count for this ability.

feats.name: Skull Creeper
feats.description: You wear skulls to demoralize foes. You become trained in Intimidation and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Intimidating Glare] skill feat. If you're already trained in Intimidation, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. If you pa…

feats.name: Slag May
feats.description: Your mother was an iron hag known for physical prowess, and you have one violet or steel-gray eye.

feats.name: Slink
feats.description: You can move through gloom with the speed of darkness.

feats.name: Slither
feats.description: You are an expert at moving through extremely tight spaces.

feats.name: Small Speak
feats.description: You understand the languages of most small insects and can speak to them.

feats.name: Smashing Tail
feats.description: You have a tail that serves as a potent weapon. You gain a tail unarmed attack that deals @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage, has the sweep trait, and is in the brawling weapon group.

feats.name: Smokesoul
feats.description: You have a connection to smoke and haze. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Smoke Blending] reaction.

feats.name: Snare Setter
feats.description: You are adept at the time-honored kobold art of making traps.

feats.name: Sneaky
feats.description: Stealth is an important tool in your arsenal.

feats.name: Snow May
feats.description: You're the child of a winter hag, with one blue-white eye and an affinity for rime and snow.

feats.name: Sociable
feats.description: You're extremely extroverted, and you often spend your time carousing or otherwise socializing.

feats.name: Social Camouflage
feats.description: You have the uncanny ability to quickly blend into the lifestyle of whatever settlement in which you find yourself.

feats.name: Speak with Bats
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with bats. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on all Diplomacy checks to Make an Impression on bats or Request something from bats.

feats.name: Spelunker
feats.description: Living underground, you have learned to find your way without landmarks or even solid ground.

feats.name: Spine Stabber
feats.description: The quills on your arms are particularly sharp and sturdy. You gain a quills unarmed attack that deals @Damage[1d6[piercing]] damage. Your quills are in the knife weapon group and have the finesse and unarmed traits.

feats.name: Spirit Coffin
feats.description: A hump forms on your back that allows you to attack and trap spirits.
prerequisites: bakuwa lizardfolk heritage or Tian Xia origin

feats.name: Springsoul
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as fresh blossoms, spring fruits, and the seeds of new life, and you harness this power to spread vitality and abundance.

feats.name: Sprite's Spark
feats.description: You can fling a portion of your magic at foes.

feats.name: Squawk!
feats.description: Trigger You critically fail a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check against a creature that doesn't have the tengu trait.

feats.name: Star Orb
feats.description: Your magic has crystallized into a spherical stone.

feats.name: Startling Appearance (Fleshwarp)
feats.description: You are trained in Intimidation (or another skill of your choice, if you were already trained in Intimidation) and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Intimidating Glare] skill feat as a bonus feat.

feats.name: Steady on Stone
feats.description: Your connection to the earth makes natural uneven surfaces less of a hindrance for you.

feats.name: Steelhoof
feats.description: You've girded your hooves in steel or other reinforcements aimed to inflict maximum damage. Your hoof attack deals 1d8 bludgeoning damage instead of 1d6.

feats.name: Stone Face
feats.description: You've mastered the art of composure, even in the face of fear.

feats.name: Stonemason's Eye
feats.description: You understand the intricacies of stonework.

feats.name: Storm's Lash
feats.description: Wind and lightning have always been friends to you. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Electric Arc] cantrip as a primal innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Stormsoul
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as tumultuous, thundering storms, with dark clouds and bolts of lightning. You gain resistance to electricity equal to half your level (minimum 1).

feats.name: Story Crooner
feats.description: You're a talented story weaver and use your voice effectively.

feats.name: Straveika
feats.description: You descend from one of the truly ancient vampires, a nosferatu cursed to eternal life but not eternal youth.

feats.name: Striking Retribution
feats.description: You have an appropriately intense hatred for alghollthus.

feats.name: Strix Defender
feats.description: Your ancestral feud with humans gives you experience dealing with vicious foes, and your vengeance knows no bounds.

feats.name: Strix Lore
feats.description: You're well connected to your tribe and perhaps even strix communities beyond your own, where you've learned about the land and techniques of graceful movement.

feats.name: Studious Magic
feats.description: You've taken an interest in anadi arcane traditions. Choose one cantrip from the arcane spell list. You can cast this spell as an arcane innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Sublime Mobility
feats.description: Your heritage has granted you either impressive athletic skill or a physical feature that aids in traversal. You gain either a climb Speed or a swim Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Sudden Mindfulness
feats.description: Trigger You roll a success on a saving throw against an effect that would make you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fascinated] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled].

feats.name: Sudden Terror
feats.description: You leverage your body's amorphous nature to spook others.

feats.name: Suli Lore
feats.description: Your janni heritage grants you understanding of all elements. You become trained in Diplomacy and Nature. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Genie Lore.

feats.name: Suli-jann
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor was a janni, genies that walk the mortal world and embody all four elements together.

feats.name: Summiting Dragonblood
feats.description: Thanks to your draconic blood, there are no mountains or hills you can't surmount.

feats.name: Sunlit Vitality
feats.description: You gain nourishment through photosynthesis, like trees and other green plants.

feats.name: Sure Feet
feats.description: Whether keeping your balance or climbing, your feet easily find purchase.

feats.name: Surface Culture
feats.description: Access any surface dwarf ethnicity Your interactions with other cultures on the surface have not only taught you about many other ancestries, but have also helped you realize the value of your own.

feats.name: Surface Skimmer
feats.description: By sinking gently beneath the waves, you obscure your presence and utilize the water as a barrier between you and land combatants. While you are submerged just below the water's surface, you have cover from attacks made by creatures out of the water.

feats.name: Surki Lore
feats.description: Either through the tales of elders in your settlement or through the messages thumped by those who oversaw your generation dig, you hold the knowledge of many surkis before you.

feats.name: Surki Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Surki weapons favor utility and practicality over grace and brutality.

feats.name: Svetocher
feats.description: You were born to a moroi, the most common vampires, and you share their supernatural fortitude and power of persuasion.

feats.name: Swift
feats.description: You move with the wind always at your back. Your Speed increases by 5 feet. Special The Speed increase from this feat isn't cumulative with any Speed increase from your ancestry feats (such as Nimble Elf).

feats.name: Swimmer's Guidance
feats.description: You're always ready to help those floundering in the water.

feats.name: Sylph Lore
feats.description: Your air elemental heritage grants you understanding of winds and weather. You become trained in Acrobatics and Nature. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Plane of Air Lore.

feats.name: Take Flight
feats.description: Frequency once per round Though it's not fully effective, much of your ability to fly has stayed with you.

feats.name: Take Wing
feats.description: Frequency once per round You have strengthened your wings and can now fly for short distances.

feats.name: Talos Lore
feats.description: Your metal elemental heritage connects you to metallurgy and crafting. You become trained in Crafting and Athletics. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Plane of Metal Lore.

feats.name: Tangle of Limbs
feats.description: Dokkaebi have a strong tradition of wrestling.
prerequisites: dokkaebi goblin heritage or Tian Xia origin

feats.name: Tangle-Tongue's Wit
feats.description: Your talent for language is a blessing from the yaksha makers of old. You learn two new languages, chosen from languages you have access to. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your saving throws against linguistic effects.

feats.name: Tanuki Lore
feats.description: Tanuki love to play two things: tricks and music.

feats.name: Teakettle Form
feats.description: Your shapeshifting is advanced enough to take the form of not just creatures, but objects as well.

feats.name: Tengu Lore
feats.description: You learned skills for surviving in the place where your people were dispersed.

feats.name: Tengu Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tengu trait plus the katana, khakkara, temple sword, and wakizashi.

feats.name: Terra Dragonblood
feats.description: Each step upon the earth makes your blood resonate.

feats.name: Terrifying Croak
feats.description: You release a haunting croak that reminds those around you of their fears.

feats.name: Theoretical Acumen
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You succeed at a skill check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Recall Knowledge] to identify a creature.

feats.name: Throat Pocket
feats.description: You've trained to use unique nagaji eating habits to your advantage.

feats.name: Tide-hardened
feats.description: You're at home in the unpredictable tides. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against cold and water effects. If you roll a success on a save against a cold or water effect, you get a critical success instead.

feats.name: Tinkering Fingers
feats.description: You're trained in Crafting. If you are trained in Crafting from another source (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Repair] an item without using a r…

feats.name: Titan Slinger
feats.description: You have learned how to use your sling to fell enormous creatures. When you hit on an attack with a weapon of the sling group against a Large or larger creature, increase the size of the weapon damage die by one step.

feats.name: Tooth and Claw
feats.description: You've become adept with your born weapons. Choose a second animal attack appropriate to your animal type and heritage.

feats.name: Tough Skin
feats.description: Your skin is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, and has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of +3, and the comfort trait.

feats.name: Traditional Ways
feats.description: You are a fervent follower of the long-standing elven traditions established when your people returned to Kyonin.

feats.name: Traveler's Counsel
feats.description: On your travels, you've resolved countless disputes and counseled those in need.

feats.name: Tripkee Lore
feats.description: You are well versed in tripkee culture and tactics.

feats.name: Tripkee Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tripkee trait.

feats.name: Tupilaq Carver
feats.description: Access Erutaki ethnicity You know the truth behind old stories that tell of sending a fetish of bone and sinew to seek vengeance.
prerequisites: You have a spellcasting class feature with the divine or primal tradition

feats.name: Tusks
feats.description: You have prominent tusks that give you a tusks unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage.

feats.name: Tusks (Half-Orc)
feats.description: Most half-orcs have visible tusks, but yours are particularly large and sharp, capable of gouging deep wounds.

feats.name: Tusks (Orc)
feats.description: You have particularly long, jagged tusks perfect for tearing meat from bone.

feats.name: Twilight Dweller
feats.description: You're accustomed to shaded forests and caves. You gain low-light vision. If you already have low-light vision, you gain darkvision. Special You can select this feat twice.

feats.name: Twitchy
feats.description: You are naturally suspicious and wary of danger, especially when you suspect someone might be leading you into an ambush.

feats.name: Unassuming Dedication
feats.description: Access Uhlam ethnicity Your family instilled the values of care and patience into you from a young age. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to perform a downtime activity.

feats.name: Unbowed, Unbroken
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as resilience—towering trees, rough bark, deep roots, and patient determination. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Unwavering Resilience] reaction.

feats.name: Unburdened Iron
feats.description: You've learned techniques first devised by your ancestors during their ancient wars, allowing you to comfortably wear massive suits of armor.

feats.name: Uncanny Agility
feats.description: You have near-supernatural poise that lets you move swiftly across the most unsteady surfaces.

feats.name: Uncanny Duplication
feats.description: Your nature as a duplicate creature gives you insight into illusions and copies. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to Seek and to Will saves against illusion effects.

feats.name: Unconventional Weaponry
feats.description: You've familiarized yourself with a particular weapon, potentially from another ancestry or culture. Choose an uncommon simple or martial weapon with a trait corresponding to an ancestry (such as dwarf, goblin, or orc) or that is common in another culture. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, it is a simple weapon. If you are trained in all martial weapons, you can choose an uncommon advanced weapon.

feats.name: Undaunted
feats.description: Your spirit has endured many challenges over its long existence. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against emotion effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.

feats.name: Undead Empathy
feats.description: Your relationship with undeath gives you a stronger bond with other undead.

feats.name: Undine Lore
feats.description: Your water elemental heritage connects you to aquatic environments. You become trained in Athletics and Nature. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Plane of Water Lore.

feats.name: Unexpected Shift
feats.description: Trigger You would take damage from an attack, spell, or other effect.

feats.name: Unfettered Halfling
feats.description: You were either pressed into indentured servitude or shackled in a prison, but you've since escaped and have trained to ensure you'll never be caught again.

feats.name: Unwavering Guide
feats.description: Sharp-eyed and sure-footed, your presence is a boon to those you guide.

feats.name: Unwavering Mien
feats.description: Your mystic control and meditations allow you to resist external influences upon your consciousness. Whenever you are affected by a mental effect that lasts at least 2 rounds, you can reduce the duration by 1 round. You still require natural sleep, but you treat your saving throws against effects that would cause you to fall asleep as one degree of success better.

feats.name: Vampire Lore
feats.description: You were raised by your vampiric parent, or you've invested substantial time and energy researching the secrets of your undead progenitors.

feats.name: Vanara Lore
feats.description: You attained the cultural training of a ba-sadhak, a seeker of treasures and rare delights.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor weapons steeped in vanaran tradition.

feats.name: Veil May
feats.description: Born of a blood hag, a fiery blood drinker hidden behind a false skin, you have one blood-red eye and the ability to slough off your appearance in an instant.

feats.name: Very Sneaky
feats.description: Taller folk rarely pay attention to the shadows at their feet, and you take full advantage of this.

feats.name: Vestigial Magicsense
feats.description: While most surkis' ability to taste magic fades once they metamorphose into their adult form—replaced by keener darkvision—you've retained some of this sense.

feats.name: Vestigial Wings
feats.description: You possess small, weak wings that aid in balance. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Steady Balance] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat Fall] skill feats as bonus feats, even if you aren't trained in Acrobatics.

feats.name: Vibrant Display
feats.description: Frequency once every 10 minutes Whereas most gnomes' coloration is static or changes slowly, you can cause your hair, eye, and skin color to scintillate in brief and disorienting bursts.

feats.name: Vicious Incisors
feats.description: Your jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage instead of 1d4, and gains the backstabber trait. You can file down your teeth and regrow them later on, enabling you to select this feat at any level, and to retrain into and out of this feat.

feats.name: Vigorous Health
feats.description: You can withstand blood loss startlingly well. Whenever you would gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained] condition, you can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, you don't gain the drained condition.

feats.name: Viking Shieldbearer
feats.description: Access Ulfen ethnicity You trained with shields and weapons as soon as you were old enough to hold them, eager to win honor and glory for yourself.

feats.name: Virga May
feats.description: Born of a storm hag, you have one crystal-blue or rain-gray eye.

feats.name: Vishkanya Lore
feats.description: You deeply understand vishkanyan strengths and cultural traditions.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor weapons historically used in subtle work and in ceremony.

feats.name: Voice of the Night
feats.description: You hear and understand the words of creatures you share the darkness with.

feats.name: Warped Reflection
feats.description: Frequency once per minute Due to your origins, your form is more flexible than most.

feats.name: Warren Friend
feats.description: You're adept at making contact with other ysoki.

feats.name: Warren Navigator
feats.description: You gain the trained proficiency rank in Survival.

feats.name: Wash Out
feats.description: Toxins seep out of your artificial body quickly.

feats.name: Watchful Gaze
feats.description: You use your many eyes to look in all directions at once, making you extremely observant for a short period of time. You gain All-Around Vision until the start of your next turn. This lets you see in all directions and prevents you from being flanked.

feats.name: Watchful Halfling
feats.description: You pay close attention to the people around you, allowing you to more easily notice when they act out of character.

feats.name: Water Breathing
feats.description: You can breathe water as easily as air. You gain the ability to breathe underwater indefinitely.

feats.name: Water Nagaji
feats.description: Much like a water naga, you've formed a connection to a sacred or pristine body of water, either as a home or a place to protect. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Breath Control] general feat as a bonus feat and a swim Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Wave Speaker
feats.description: Being part fish yourself, you can speak the language of the sea.

feats.name: Waxed Feathers
feats.description: Your feathers are coated in a waxy substance that repels water.

feats.name: Wayang Lore
feats.description: You can use your knowledge to enhance your performances or aid you in hiding.

feats.name: Wayang Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You learned to fight with weapons that help you keep your distance or make the most of striking from shadows.

feats.name: Web Walker
feats.description: You have plenty of practice navigating webs.

feats.name: Web Weaver
feats.description: You can produce a soft silk to weave into useful items.

feats.name: Well-Met Traveler
feats.description: You naturally adopt a pleasant and affable demeanor when meeting others.

feats.name: Whitecape
feats.description: You're shorter and wider than many vanaras of your heritage, and the hair on your shoulders and your head is particularly thick and luxurious, like a majestic cape.

feats.name: Wildborn Magic
feats.description: Access Mualijae ethnicity You have learned to access the old magic of wild places.

feats.name: Wilderness Born
feats.description: You're at home in the wilderness and easily disappear into it.
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait

feats.name: Willing Death
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger An ally within 30 feet takes damage that would otherwise reduce them to 0 Hit Points and give them the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dying] condition.

feats.name: Wind Pillow
feats.description: The winds have whispered to you all your life, and the essence of air itself helps you at times, making you somewhat buoyant when you're suspended in space.

feats.name: Wind Tempered
feats.description: You are at home in tempestuous weather and accustomed to even the harshest winds. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against air and electricity effects. If you roll a success on a save against an air effect, you get a critical success instead.

feats.name: Winter Cat Senses
feats.description: Your eyes are keen and accustomed to winter conditions. You ignore concealment caused by ice and snow.

feats.name: Witch Warden
feats.description: Access Kellid ethnicity You and your family have fought long and hard against witches, particularly the winter witches of Irrisen, and you've learned to be wary of their curses and the otherworldly powers their patrons grant.

feats.name: Woodcraft
feats.description: You have a innate familiarity with forested areas.

feats.name: Woodworker
feats.description: Denizens of the Plane of Wood take immense pride in the magnificent works of art they can craft from wood, and practicing your own woodcraft helps you feel a connection with your planar heritage.

feats.name: Yaoguai Historian
feats.description: You know extensively about your own kind. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Occultism. If you would automatically become trained in this skill (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also …

feats.name: You're So Cute!
feats.description: You know how to put on the charm, doing playful tricks to win favor.

feats.name: Absorb Strength
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Requirements You are adjacent to an enemy's corpse who has been dead for no longer than 1 minute.

feats.name: Accommodating Mount
feats.description: You've trained to serve as a mount, if only for your most trusted allies.

feats.name: Adaptive Adept
feats.description: You've continued adapting your magic to blend your class's tradition with your adapted tradition. Choose a cantrip or 1st-level spell from the same tradition as your adapted cantrip. You gain that spell, adding it to your spell repertoire or prepared spells.

feats.name: Advanced Targeting System
feats.description: Your ocular processors are augmented with advanced targeting systems, which allow you to more easily pinpoint your enemy and read their movements. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sure Strike] once per day as a 1st-rank arcane innate spell.

feats.name: Affliction Resistance
feats.description: Your diet has strengthened you against diseases and poisons.

feats.name: Ageless Patience
feats.description: You work at a pace born from longevity that enhances your thoroughness. You can voluntarily spend twice as long as normal on a Perception check or a skill check in order to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to that check. You also don't treat a natural 1 as worse than usual on these checks; you get a failure only if your result is below the DC.

feats.name: Agonizing Rebuke
feats.description: When you terrorize your enemies, you also cause them painful mental distress.

feats.name: Alarming Disappearance
feats.description: Your ability to move unseen is startling for one your size, causing panic among your enemies.

feats.name: All This Has Happened Before
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You're about to roll initiative.

feats.name: Ally's Shelter
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You attempt a saving throw while adjacent to one or more allies, but you haven't rolled yet. You follow your allies' example. Roll the save using an adjacent ally's modifier for that type of saving throw instead of your own.

feats.name: Ambush Awareness
feats.description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks attempted as initiative rolls. Additionally, if your initiative roll result is tied with that of an opponent, you go first, regardless of whether you rolled Perception or not.

feats.name: Among Humanity
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your talents in shapechanging allow you to pass unseen.

feats.name: Amorphous Aspect
feats.description: Your body is supremely flexible. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks to Escape or Squeeze, and when you critically fail when Squeezing, you get a failure instead.

feats.name: Ancestral Suspicion
feats.description: Long-lived elves have seen civilizations rise and fall, often at the hands of outside forces. As a result, they have developed a wariness of others who might seek to influence or control them. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that would make you controlled.

feats.name: Anchoring Roots
feats.description: Small roots sprout from your feet, steadying you as you move. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Steady Balance] skill feat, even if you aren't trained in Acrobatics, and you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Anchor] action.

feats.name: And Will Do So Once More
feats.description: You've learned how to let go of most worries and move past them.

feats.name: Animal Shape
feats.description: You can shift into a Small or Medium animal form related to your inherent animal. This functions as pest form, but you can remain in this form for up to 10 minutes.

feats.name: Animal Speaker
feats.description: You can speak to all animals, not just a particular subset. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Make an Impression on animals (which usually uses the Diplomacy skill).
prerequisites: ability to communicate with some type of animals (such as bats or arthropods)

feats.name: Animalistic Resistance
feats.description: Your animalistic connections help you resist natural afflictions. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saves to resist diseases and poisons.

feats.name: Ankle Bite
feats.description: Trigger A foe gives you the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] condition using a part of its body.
prerequisites: Fang Sharpener or razortooth goblin heritage

feats.name: Apprentice Sea Witch
feats.description: You're familiar with the basic spells that most educated merfolk know.

feats.name: Aquatic Conversationalist
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals with the amphibious or aquatic traits. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Make an Impression] on such animals.

feats.name: Arcane Safeguards
feats.description: The magic powering you makes it difficult for outside magic to affect you.

feats.name: Ascended Dragonet Heritage
feats.description: You've awoken the power of your draconic heritage. You gain all the mechanical benefits of the dragonet heritage you selected at first level, allowing you to take feats and gain any benefits that require a specific dragonet heritage.

feats.name: Athletic Might
feats.description: Surviving in hostile terrain has given you a great talent for mobility. Whenever you roll a success on an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Climb] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Swim], you get a critical success instead.

feats.name: Awakened Yaoguai Heritage
feats.description: You've delved into the power of your legacy. You gain all the mechanical benefits of the yaoguai heritage you selected at first level, allowing you to take feats and gain any benefits that require a specific yaoguai heritage.

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Aptitude
feats.description: You become familiar with using your weapons both in and out of water.

feats.name: Beast of Burden
feats.description: Your broad frame can allow you to carry weights that immobilize smaller creatures. Increase your maximum and encumbered Bulk limits by 4. You can rest normally while wearing medium armor.

feats.name: Benefactor's Strike
feats.description: Your benefactor's blood flows through your veins, and you channel their power into your body.

feats.name: Bestial Brutality
feats.description: Your animalistic unarmed attack grows more dangerous. The unarmed attack you chose for Bestial Manifestation gains the deadly d6 trait. Whenever you score a critical hit with this unarmed attack, you get the brawling critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Blast Resistance
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Blessed Blood (Nephilim)
feats.description: Your spilled blood is sanctified, with effects similar to those of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Holy Water].

feats.name: Blood And Spirit
feats.description: Your connection to the divine has sanctified your blood, but the power only manifests when you are shedding it.

feats.name: Blood Drinker
feats.description: You can drink blood to sustain yourself. When you successfully Strike a living creature with your fangs and deal damage, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage dealt (minimum 1). These temporary Hit Points last for 1 minute.

feats.name: Blood Like Water
feats.description: The watery fluid in your veins doesn't flow in the same way as traditional blood. Your DC on flat checks to end persistent bleed damage is reduced from 15 to 10, or from 10 to 5 after receiving especially appropriate assistance.

feats.name: Bloodsoaked Dash
feats.description: Injuries don't bother you anymore—in fact, the pain invigorates you. If you're at or below half of your maximum Hit Points, you gain a 10-foot status bonus to all of your Speeds.

feats.name: Bloody Blows
feats.description: Your strikes are viciously powerful. When you critically succeed at a melee Strike, the target takes 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

feats.name: Bold Defiance
feats.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You Change Shape. You harden your form as you dance between shapes. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 1 minute.

feats.name: Boulder Roll
feats.description: Your dwarven build allows you to push foes around, just like a mighty boulder tumbles through a subterranean cavern.

feats.name: Breeze Rider
feats.description: Winds carry you swiftly. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed when not encumbered and not wearing medium or heavy armor.

feats.name: Briny Beverage
feats.description: You can survive off the sea as well as gain insight from its waters.

feats.name: Bristle
feats.description: You curl into a posture that splays out your bone spines.

feats.name: Call the First Tools
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can call upon the ancient powers bestowed on you by the gods to create any tools you might need at a moment's notice.

feats.name: Call to Battle
feats.description: Trigger You lose the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] condition. You channel the undying spirit of the einherjar to join to fight. You Stand. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

feats.name: Called
feats.description: You've heard the Call, and by resisting it, you've developed a bulwark against effects that target your mind.

feats.name: Catchy Tune
feats.description: You create a tune so catchy, your foes can't help but dance along.

feats.name: Ceremony of Knowledge
feats.description: You tap into aeon knowledge. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Untrained Improvisation] general feat. In addition, you can attempt skill actions that normally require you to be trained, even if you are untrained.

feats.name: Ceremony of Sunlight
feats.description: You have learned how to master the power contained within sunlight, just like the trees that form your body. Your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.ancestryfeatures.Item.Sunlight Healing] recovers 1d8 Hit Points per level.

feats.name: Chemical Trail
feats.description: You can leave a faint chemical trail as you move and can use the chemical trails of other surkis to navigate. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to all checks and saves to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sense Direction] or reorient yourself.

feats.name: Chosen of Lamashtu
feats.description: You bear the favor and blessings of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.Lamashtu], the Mother of Monsters.

feats.name: Clan Protector
feats.description: Your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Clan Dagger] can protect your allies as easily as yourself.

feats.name: Clever Improviser
feats.description: You've learned how to handle situations when you're out of your depth. You gain the Untrained Improvisation general feat. In addition, you can attempt skill actions that normally require you to be trained, even if you are untrained.

feats.name: Clever Shadow
feats.description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your shadow, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Climate Adaptation
feats.description: Like evergreen trees, which stay healthy and vibrant from winter through summer, you too can adapt to a variety of extreme climates.

feats.name: Climbing Claws
feats.description: You can extend your claws to aid you in climbing. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Cloud Gazer
feats.description: Your connection to air allows you to see through obscuring mists.

feats.name: Colugo's Traversal
feats.description: Forbidding valleys and sheer cliffs can't curb your vows to reunite the lost.

feats.name: Conductor's Redirection
feats.description: Trigger You are hit by an attack, spell, or other effect that deals electricity damage.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Understanding
feats.description: You have come to know conrasu weapons as you know yourself.

feats.name: Coral Growth
feats.description: The difference between yourself and your coral symbiotes is nearly impossible to tell apart as your bodies are so intertwined.

feats.name: Cornered Fury
feats.description: If a foe of a larger size than you critically hits and damages you, that foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to you for 1 round.

feats.name: Cultural Adaptability
feats.description: During your adventures, you've honed your ability to adapt to the culture of the predominant ancestry around you.

feats.name: Cunning Hair
feats.description: Your hair moves under your control. You can perform simple @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Interact] actions with your hair, such as opening an unlocked door. Your hair can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, includi…

feats.name: Cunning Tinker
feats.description: Time spent tending to your own form has unlocked your ability to fix other things.

feats.name: Darkseer
feats.description: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.Zon-Kuthon] smiles upon you-even if you curse his name-granting you pitch-black eyes that allow you to see in shadows and darkness. You gain darkvision.

feats.name: Darting Monkey
feats.description: You have a heightened awareness in combat, and your darting strikes prevent your foes from distracting you or breaking your focus.

feats.name: Deadly Aspect
feats.description: You have honed the unarmed attack your draconic heritage has granted you to a lethal degree. The unarmed attack you gained from Draconic Aspect gains the deadly d8 trait.

feats.name: Debilitating Venom
feats.description: Your venom is particularly potent, affecting targets in different ways.

feats.name: Defensive Needles
feats.description: Your body is covered in sharp needles or spines which you can use to defend yourself.
prerequisites: Cactus Leshy or Pine Leshy heritage

feats.name: Defiance Unto Death
feats.description: Access Spiresworn elf You loathe the alghollthus and their mind magic, and you've been trained to be willing to die rather than give into mental manipulation.

feats.name: Deflecting Jewel
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You're the target of a ranged attack while you possess your head gem.

feats.name: Defy Death
feats.description: You're exceptionally difficult to kill. The DC of your recovery checks is equal to 9 + your dying value, or 8 + your dying value if you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Toughness] general feat. In addition, whenever someone returns you to life us…

feats.name: Defy the Darkness
feats.description: Using ancient dwarven methods developed to fight enemies wielding magical darkness, you've honed your darkvision and sworn not to use such magic yourself.

feats.name: Demonblood Frenzy
feats.description: Access Matanji ethnicity Frequency once per minute Trigger You successfully Strike a living creature that has the fiend trait with your tusks unarmed attack.

feats.name: Devil in Plain Sight
feats.description: You've learned to draw your fiendish nature into a small ball of corruption and hide it in your soul.

feats.name: Devilish Wiles
feats.description: Traditionally, fiends are exceptionally good at persuading people to do things, even when their targets know it's a bad idea.

feats.name: Dissolution's Clarity
feats.description: Requirements You're in an area of darkness. The Dissolution teaches that darkness can bring clarity and focus, serenity and strength—and so you draw on nearby shadows to replenish your magic. You regain 1 Focus Point, up to your usual maximum.

feats.name: Distant Archer
feats.description: You've trained to harry your foes from great distances, using your swiftness to maintain distance and keen eyesight to stay on target.

feats.name: Distant Cackle
feats.description: It takes a very brave person to enter the laughter-haunted forest where you dwell. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ventriloquism] once per day as a 1st-rank occult innate spell.

feats.name: Dogfang Bite
feats.description: You can swing your beak to slash your foes when piercing attacks won't do. Your beak unarmed attack gains the versatile S weapon trait.

feats.name: Draconic Scent
feats.description: Your sense of smell has heightened to be as keen as that of a dragon. You gain imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. At their discretion, the GM might double this range if you're downwind from the creature or halve this range if you're upwind.

feats.name: Drag Down
feats.description: While swimming in water at least 10 feet deep, you grab an adjacent creature (on nearby land or in the water) and pull it below the surface.

feats.name: Dragon Breath
feats.description: You can exhale a small gout of energy. You gain a breath weapon usable once per hour. The breath weapon is a 15-foot cone or a 30-foot line that deals 2d6 damage of the type you chose for Draconic Resistance (basic Reflex save). The damage increases by 1d6 at 9th, 13th, and 17th level.

feats.name: Dragon's Flight
feats.description: Frequency once per round You have grown a small pair of draconic wings or have honed your use of the wings you've had since birth.

feats.name: Dual Element
feats.description: You can wield two elements at once. When you use Elemental Assault, you can choose two damage types instead of one. Your additional damage is split evenly between the two chosen types.

feats.name: Duck!
feats.description: Your long experience with your erratic patrons and their peers has given you a lot of practice in hitting the deck when you hear the rumbling of a powerful entity.

feats.name: Dwarven Reinforcement
feats.description: You can use your knowledge of engineering and metalwork to temporarily strengthen thick objects and structures.

feats.name: Earthbond
feats.description: Your bond to the terra firma under your feet increases as your connection to your draconic aspect grows.

feats.name: Easily Dismissed
feats.description: Access Chelaxian nationality You are practiced at blending into the background of the streets and halls of larger folk to ensure that you are overlooked.

feats.name: Eat Fortune
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 60 feet uses a fortune or misfortune effect.

feats.name: Eclectic Obsession
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your desire for stimulation has led you from one pursuit to another and granted you a smattering of expertise with myriad crafts and professions.

feats.name: Elemental Spark
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin (but see Special ) You've learned to alter the magic of your sprite's spark, imparting them with elemental energies.

feats.name: Elven Persistence
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a skill check you're at least trained in.

feats.name: Embodied Dreadnought Subjectivity
feats.description: Access You're from Nex. Your colossal might marks you as a behemoth, the pride of Nex's Fleshforges, and the heaviest ordnance is a child's toy in your monumental grasp. You're a dreadnought, a living siege weapon, albeit one that wields other siege weapons i…

feats.name: Empathic Calm
feats.description: Once per day, you can cast either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Calm] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sanctuary] as an innate occult spell, heightened to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Energize Wings
feats.description: Your magic energizes your wings, allowing you to fly farther. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Evanescent Wings] increases to 25 feet.

feats.name: Energized Font
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can focus your mind more quickly thanks to the magic that flows within you. You regain 1 Focus Point, up to your usual maximum.
prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a gnome heritage or ancestry feat that shares a tradition with at least one of your focus spells

feats.name: Enforced Order
feats.description: You bring structure to combat. When you critically succeed at an attack roll, the target is flat-footed until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Enthralling Allure
feats.description: The powers of domination employed by your progenitors have manifested in you as well.

feats.name: Entropy Adept
feats.description: You embrace the unpredictability of chaos. Once per day, before rolling a d20, you can choose to roll 2d20 and take either result.

feats.name: Envenom Fangs
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You envenom your fangs.

feats.name: Expanded Luck
feats.description: You are luckier even than most catfolk. You can trigger @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat's Luck] when you fail or critically fail a Fortitude or Will saving throw in addition to Reflex saving throws. You still can use Cat's Luck only once per day.

feats.name: Expert Drill Sergeant
feats.description: While exploring, when you are leading and allies are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Follow the Expert]{Following the Expert}, instead of granting a +2 circumstance bonus in the applicable skill, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus if you're an expert an…

feats.name: Extinguish Light
feats.description: Frequency once every 10 minutes You wrap shadow around a single unattended light source within 120 feet that's no larger than a torch.

feats.name: Extraplanar Haze
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your body emits tiny particles of extraplanar matter, such as crystalline motes or smoky vapor, that surround you in a haze.

feats.name: Extraplanar Supplication
feats.description: You call upon divine power to place a benediction upon your allies or a malediction upon your foes.

feats.name: False Priest Form
feats.description: Nobody respects tanuki, but most everyone respects an esteemed priest, so what better form to take if you want to get by a little easier? When you Change Shape, you can assume the shape of a priest or other religious official from a religion of your choosing.

feats.name: Fantastic Leaps
feats.description: Your leaps seem to defy gravity as you soar through the air in a single bound. When Leaping, increase the maximum distance you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Leap] horizontally by 10 feet, and the maximum distance you can Leap vertically by 5 feet.

feats.name: Favorable Winds
feats.description: You wrap a shell of favorable wind around a weapon you wield.

feats.name: Feathered Cloak
feats.description: To blend in with the grounded and wingless, you fold your wings just so on your back, creating the illusion of a feathered cloak.

feats.name: Feed on Pain
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You deal mental damage.

feats.name: Fey Disguise
feats.description: You can disguise yourself with magical illusions.

feats.name: Fey Influence
feats.description: You have been exposed to powerful fey magic.

feats.name: Fierce Grasp
feats.description: Requirements You have an opponent @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained].

feats.name: Fighting Horn
feats.description: You can modify the size and shape of your horn over time using your mental powers.

feats.name: Finned Ridges
feats.description: The ridges and flaps of your skin steer you through the water. You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Firesight
feats.description: You can see through the haze of flame. You automatically succeed at the flat check to target a concealed creature if that creature is concealed only by smoke and fire.

feats.name: Fishblooded
feats.description: There's nothing beneath the waves that can slow you down. When in an aquatic environment, you ignore difficult terrain. In addition, swimming up or down isn't difficult terrain for you.

feats.name: Flexible Tail
feats.description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Fluid Contortionist
feats.description: You can ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to Squeeze.

feats.name: Focused Cat Nap
feats.description: When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat Nap], you can also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Refocus] as you dream of a relevant activity.

feats.name: Forest Stealth
feats.description: Requirements You are in a forest or jungle environment near an environmental feature that would allow you to Take Cover.

feats.name: Formation Training
feats.description: You know how to fight in formation with your brethren.

feats.name: Fortify Shield
feats.description: Frequency once per day You reinforce your shield with a rocky outgrowth of metal and stone.

feats.name: Friend of the Family
feats.description: You come from a long line of imperial kobolds—if you meet a stranger who has some political standing in Tian Xia, they might know someone from your family line.

feats.name: Friendform
feats.description: The shared bond between you and your allies allows you to act on their behalf.

feats.name: Gaping Flesh
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature you are aware of damages you with a melee Strike.

feats.name: Garuda's Squall
feats.description: Garudas' marksmanship and magic are second nature to you. Whenever you critically hit using a bow, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Gecko's Grip
feats.description: You cling to walls with a preternatural grip.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Flourish
feats.description: Whenever you critically hit using a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Falchion], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ranseur], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Scimitar], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Trident], or a geniekin wea…

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Practice
feats.description: With plenty of practice, the memories of previous fights from previous lives come flooding back. Whenever you critically hit using a glaive, greatclub, hatchet, scythe, sickle, or ghoran weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Glorious Gamtu
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can access the mystical power that dokkaebi refer to as a hat.

feats.name: Gnaw
feats.description: With enough time and determination, you can chew through nearly anything. You deal double your jaws damage to an unattended, inanimate object.

feats.name: Graceful Guidance
feats.description: You can demonstrate how to quickly twist out of the way of dangerous effects.

feats.name: Greater Animal Senses
feats.description: Your senses advance to match those of your animal aspect.

feats.name: Grovel
feats.description: You convince your foe you're less of a threat.

feats.name: Growing Eel Friend
feats.description: Your eel pet grows larger and stronger. Your eel pet's size changes to Small, and the eel gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.Scent] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.Tough] pet abilities. However, it becomes too large to c…

feats.name: Guided by the Stars
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are about to attempt a skill check or saving throw.

feats.name: Halfling Ingenuity
feats.description: While your willingness to dig into a task you know little about might get you into trouble, your incredible luck often saves you from danger.

feats.name: Hasty Celebration
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll against an enemy, or an enemy critically fails their saving throw against one of your effects.

feats.name: Healer's Halo
feats.description: Trigger You or allies within 30 feet recover Hit Points while your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Halo] is active.

feats.name: Healing Flesh
feats.description: Some legends claim that the flesh of a merfolk, if consumed, can grant health, longevity, and even immortality.

feats.name: Heat Wave
feats.description: Trigger An effect would deal fire damage to you, even if you resist all the damage.

feats.name: Histrionic Injury
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger A creature you can see damages you with a melee Strike.

feats.name: Hopping Stride
feats.description: You've internalized the hopping gait of your vampiric forebear.

feats.name: Hunter's Fangs
feats.description: Your fangs are exceptionally painful. Whenever you score a critical hit with your fangs unarmed attack, you apply the unarmed attack's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Hybrid Shape
feats.description: Mastery of your shapeshifting lets you combine the best features of your humanoid and spider forms.

feats.name: Hydraulic Deflection
feats.description: You can summon a shield of water when attacked. Once per day, when you are hit by a physical attack, you can use your reaction to gain resistance to physical damage equal to your level against that attack.

feats.name: Hypnotic Lure
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Your unblinking gaze is so intense it can befuddle the mind of others, drawing your victims toward you even against their better judgment.

feats.name: Immobile Form
feats.description: You take on the shape you had before you awoke to hide in plain sight.
prerequisites: born of item, born of elements, or born of vegetation heritage

feats.name: Inhale, Exhale!
feats.description: You take an especially deep breath as a prelude to unleashing your dragonet breath on your foes.

feats.name: Inoculation Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites reject diseases with ease. Each time you succeed at a Fortitude save against an ongoing disease, you reduce its stage by 2, or by 1 against a virulent disease. Each critical success you achieve against an ongoing disease reduces its stage by 3, o…

feats.name: Inspire Imitation
feats.description: Your adaptability inspires others to follow your example. When you succeed at a skill check, you can use a reaction to grant an ally within 30 feet a +1 circumstance bonus to the same type of check until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Insulated Poppet
feats.description: You've used insulating wraps or special glazes to reduce your weakness to current and temperature. You no longer have the weakness to either electricity or cold caused by your tsukumogami heritage.
prerequisites: you have a metal or ceramic body

feats.name: Integrated Armament
feats.description: Your mechanical body houses a weapon or shield that you can quickly draw and stow, leaving you prepared for combat at all times.

feats.name: Intuitive Illusions
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins.

feats.name: Inured to the Heat
feats.description: Your have a love for extreme heat. You gain resistance 4 to fire. You treat environmental heat effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible heat becomes extreme, extreme heat becomes severe, and so on).

feats.name: Iruxi Glide
feats.description: You glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 25 feet forward through the air. As long as you spend at least 1 action gliding each round and haven't yet reached the ground, you remain in the air at the end of your turn.

feats.name: Jealous Grip
feats.description: Trigger A creature in your reach that you're aware of attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Disarm] you, or damage or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Steal] an item in your possession.

feats.name: Jotun's Battle Stance
feats.description: You emulate the battle stance of your forebears, allowing you to use mighty weapons to attack distant foes. While in this stance, when you wield a melee weapon that requires two hands and doesn't have reach, the weapon gains a reach of 10 feet.

feats.name: Jotun's Grasp
feats.description: You've mastered a technique that allows you to close the gap on foes and wrestle them into submission. You Step and attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Grapple] a creature.

feats.name: Jungle Runner
feats.description: You run through the jungle as easily as you would through an open field.

feats.name: Juvenile Flight
feats.description: Your wings become stronger, allowing you to fly farther. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Fledgling Flight] increases to 25 feet.

feats.name: Kin Hunter
feats.description: You're adept at combating other supernatural creatures.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Mysteries
feats.description: You know more kitsune magic. During your daily preparations, choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Bane], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Object], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sanctuary]. You can cast this as a 1st-rank divin…
prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a kitsune heritage or ancestry feat

feats.name: Kneecap
feats.description: You deliver a punishing blow to an enemy's knee, shin, or other vulnerable anatomy within your reach.

feats.name: Kobold Momentum
feats.description: You possess the confidence of a dragon, and your success emboldens you to draw on power reserves you didn't know you had.

feats.name: Lab Rat
feats.description: You've spent more than your share of time in an alchemy lab.

feats.name: Labyrinthine Echoes
feats.description: You can make your voice reverberate off any surface. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ventriloquism] as an occult innate spell. At 7th level, this spell is heightened to 2nd rank.

feats.name: Late Awakener
feats.description: Whether due to a more gradual process or your animal and sapient sides being especially in conflict, your awakening was a little slower than most, but your eyes are now fully open and your abilities have returned.

feats.name: Leaf Transformation
feats.description: You know how to run an enterprise that others would never be able to get off the ground—some say it's your savvy acumen or jovial manner, but you know it's because you can cut costs by transforming leaves into money.

feats.name: Left-Hand Blood
feats.description: Frequency once per hour It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

feats.name: Leshy Glide
feats.description: Using your own leaves, you can control your descent.
prerequisites: leaf leshy heritage or Cat Fall skill feat

feats.name: Lifesense
feats.description: You have a limited ability to sense life force, like your psychopomp forebears.

feats.name: Light Paws
feats.description: You can balance on your toes to step carefully over obstructions. You Stride and then Step, or Step and then Stride, ignoring difficult terrain during this movement.

feats.name: Lightless Litheness
feats.description: Your body is almost as flexible as your shadow.

feats.name: Ligneous Fortitude
feats.description: Your wood-like body is resilient. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against poison and disease.

feats.name: Long Tongue
feats.description: You've learned to stretch your exceptionally long tongue beyond its original limits. When you use your tongue to deliver touch-range spells or perform very simple Interact actions, you can do so at a distance that is 5 feet beyond your usual reach.

feats.name: Long-Nosed Form
feats.description: You transform into a specific, curious-looking human form.

feats.name: Loud Singer
feats.description: Staying on pitch, proper breath control, and remembering the words are all less important than the real measure of a good singer: volume! The range of your Goblin Song is increased to 60 feet, and you can target one additional enemy when you use it.

feats.name: Loyal Empath
feats.description: You have incredible empathy for your friends and family, and you have an innate timing for helping others in distress.

feats.name: Lucky Break
feats.description: You are luckier even than most catfolk. You can trigger @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat's Luck] when you fail or critically fail a Fortitude saving throw, Will saving throw, Acrobatics check, or Athletics check in addition to Reflex saving throws. Yo…

feats.name: Magical Resistance
feats.description: Your animating magic provides some defense.

feats.name: Magnetic Pull
feats.description: You can magnetically attract metal objects. You can use Athletics to Disarm a creature wielding a metal weapon at a range of 10 feet instead of requiring melee reach.

feats.name: Magpie Snatch
feats.description: You move quickly, snatching a shiny item that catches your eye. Stride twice, and you can Interact to pick up an unattended object at any point during your movement.

feats.name: Marine Ally
feats.description: You've befriended a sea creature, which becomes magically bonded to you. You gain a familiar. The type of creature is up to you, but one of its abilities must always be a swim Speed or the amphibious familiar ability.

feats.name: Martial Experience
feats.description: You've crossed blades with a wide variety of foes wielding a wide variety of weapons, and you've learned the basics of fighting with nearly any of them. You gain the trained proficiency rank with all martial weapons.

feats.name: Mask of Power
feats.description: Your warmask sharpens your connection to the source of your mask's power.

feats.name: Mask of Rejection
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You fail a saving throw against an effect from your warmask 's magical tradition.

feats.name: Metabolic Control
feats.description: You're able to better control your body's metabolism to preserve energy.

feats.name: Mirror Dodge
feats.description: You can briefly phase like a flickering reflection. Once per day, when you are hit by an attack, you can use your reaction to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against that attack, potentially turning the hit into a miss.

feats.name: Mist Child
feats.description: You blend in with unnatural skill. When you are concealed or hidden, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to remain unnoticed or undetected.

feats.name: Mistaken Identity
feats.description: Frequency once per minute Trigger You're about to attempt a saving throw against a mental effect.

feats.name: Murderous Thorns
feats.description: Your thorns are many, vicious, and sharp. If you have the Hidden Thorn feat, your thorn attack gains the deadly d6 trait. If you have the thorned rose heritage, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Wicked Thorns] reaction once every hour.

feats.name: Mutate Weapon
feats.description: Select one unarmed attack you gained with Living Weapon.

feats.name: Myriad Forms
feats.description: With a bit of self-discovery, you find a new form. You gain the alternate form of a kitsune heritage other than your own, adding it to the options for your Change Shape.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Mysteries
feats.description: You've learned more naga magic. During your daily preparations, choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Charm], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fleet Step], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Heal]. You can cast the chosen spell as a 1st-rank…
prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a nagaji heritage or ancestry feat

feats.name: Nanite Shroud
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your nanites fly out of your body, swarming around you in a cloud.

feats.name: Natural Ambassador
feats.description: You remember what it was like to speak easily with other animals, using old, familiar ways of communication to learn what they want and ask for favors in return.

feats.name: Natural Illusionist
feats.description: By drawing upon the First World's magic, you can siphon a portion of that malleable world to create a convincing illusion.

feats.name: Natural Orienteering
feats.description: There are few twisting paths that can disorient you. When you roll a success on a Survival check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sense Direction] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Track], you get a critical success instead.

feats.name: Necromantic Physiology
feats.description: Your unusual physiology has developed in a way that makes it difficult for parasites and other infestations to prey upon you.

feats.name: Nephilim Resistance
feats.description: You resist energy like your extraplanar predecessors.

feats.name: No Hands, No Problem
feats.description: After a lifetime of using temporary, ghostly limbs to manipulate objects, you hardly need real hands.

feats.name: Noble Bloom
feats.description: Access chrysanthemum leshy heritage Trigger An ally within 30 feet would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

feats.name: Noble Resolve
feats.description: Once, genies ruled vast kingdoms, and a remnant of that confidence and power is reflected in your strong will.

feats.name: Nothing but Fluff
feats.description: Your fluffy interior lacks specific organs and struts, with few weak spots to injure. You gain resistance to precision damage equal to half your level.

feats.name: Nourishing Symbiosis
feats.description: As you recuperate from your wounds, life energy flows from you to the land and back to you again.

feats.name: Noxious Odor
feats.description: You have developed your skill with your defensive pheromones and have concentrated them into a noxious form.

feats.name: Offensive Analysis
feats.description: You can enhance your senses and mental state to consider every aspect of an attack. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sure Strike] as a divine innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Oni Disguise
feats.description: Like your oni forebear, you can magically disguise yourself. You can cast illusory disguise as a 1st-level occult innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Oni's Mask
feats.description: You aren't as malleable as your oni ancestors but still can disguise yourself.

feats.name: Ornate Tattoo
feats.description: You expand your tattoos to encompass greater magic. Choose a 1st-rank arcane spell from the same school as your Arcane Tattoos, either a common spell or another to which you have access. You can cast that spell once per day as an innate arcane spell.

feats.name: Pack Stalker
feats.description: Ambushes are an honored kholo tradition. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Terrain Stalker] feat and can extend its effects to a single ally so long as they remain within 10 feet of you. If you have master proficiency in Stealth, you can exten…

feats.name: Past Life
feats.description: Flashes of your life become clearer and more frequent, allowing you to apply skills you developed while alive.

feats.name: Phantom Resemblance
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your can now draw from experience to wear any face you remember.

feats.name: Plague Sniffer
feats.description: You can sniff out the pungent tang of disease.

feats.name: Planar Healing
feats.description: Your planar connection allows you to channel healing energy. You can cast heal as a 1st-level divine innate spell once per day. At 11th level, this is heightened to 3rd level.

feats.name: Planar Resilience
feats.description: Your body has adapted to the variety of harsh climes that you encounter in your travels.

feats.name: Ponpoko
feats.description: No true tanuki would ever be caught without a musical instrument to play under the full moon.

feats.name: Pounding Leap
feats.description: You use the momentum of your massive fists to launch yourself through the air.

feats.name: Powerful Guts
feats.description: Your stomach is particularly durable. When you succeed at a Fortitude save to reduce your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened] value, you reduce it by 2 (or by 3 on a critical success).

feats.name: Practiced Paddler
feats.description: You're skilled at navigating bogs and marshes, even for a paddler shoony. You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Precious Alloys
feats.description: Choose cold iron or silver. Your melee unarmed attacks have the special properties of a weapon made of that metal. If you are at least 13th level, you can choose adamantine instead of just cold iron or silver. Special You can take this ancestry feat multiple …

feats.name: Pride Hunter
feats.description: You avoid the attention of creatures focused on your allies. You can use lesser cover from your allies to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide].

feats.name: Prodigious Climber
feats.description: Your natural climbing ability and technique has made you a potent climber. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet. Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.heritages.Item.Stickytoe Tripkee] heritage, you instead gain a climb Speed of 20 feet.

feats.name: Project Persona
feats.description: Where others etch their armor to serve as a conduit for their imaginations, your vivid mind and bold personality allow you to project a more fitting persona over your lackluster armor.

feats.name: Protective Claws
feats.description: The chitin on your claws is so hard you can defend against attacks with them. Your claw unarmed attack from the vicious goloma heritage gains the parry weapon trait.

feats.name: Protective Sheath
feats.description: When you lash out with your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Clan Dagger], you keep its sheath close at hand.

feats.name: Protective Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites can augment your defenses. You can choose to activate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Nanite Surge] when you attempt a saving throw, instead of when you attempt a skill check. If you do, you gain a +2 status bonus to the triggering saving th…

feats.name: Proud Mentor
feats.description: You enjoy mentoring others and take pride in your students' accomplishments.

feats.name: Puzzle Solver
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You have a natural affinity for problem-solving and the unknown.

feats.name: Quick Root
feats.description: Trigger A creature successfully Shoves or Trips you, or you fail a saving throw against an effect that would move you or knock you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait

feats.name: Quick Stow (Ratfolk)
feats.description: Frequency once per round You Interact to store one item you're holding in your cheek pouches (provided it fits).

feats.name: Rabid Sprint
feats.description: Requirements You have both your hands free. You run on all fours as fast as you can. Stride three times.

feats.name: Ragdya's Revelry
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger An adjacent creature you can see fails an attack roll against you.

feats.name: Rat Magic
feats.description: There always seems to be a little rat around to carry messages for you.

feats.name: Ratfolk Roll
feats.description: You roll up into a ball and move up to four times your Speed in a straight line down an incline.

feats.name: Read the Roots
feats.description: Requirements You are standing on the ground, and there are plants rooted in the ground within 100 feet of you.

feats.name: Recognize Ambush
feats.description: Trigger You roll initiative. Your combat training has honed you to be ready for an attack at all times. You Interact to draw a weapon.

feats.name: Reflective Pocket
feats.description: You've formed a connection with a small hand mirror, allowing you to use it as an extradimensional storage space.

feats.name: Rekindled Light
feats.description: Trigger You or an ally within 30 feet of your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Star Orb] familiar would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

feats.name: Renewing Quills
feats.description: Your spines grow back much faster than other shisks. You can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Barbed Quills] reaction once every 10 minutes.

feats.name: Replicate
feats.description: You've learned to reshape your malleable form. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Disguise] once per day as an innate occult spell. This is a morph effect, as your body physically transforms, rather than an illusion effect.

feats.name: Resilient Physiology
feats.description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're afflicted by a disease or poison, or are taking persistent damage.

feats.name: Restoring Blood
feats.description: Your body can process an alternative to your venom that heals wounds.

feats.name: Reveal Hidden Self
feats.description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] to at least one enemy.

feats.name: Right-Hand Blood
feats.description: It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

feats.name: Riptide Mount
feats.description: Requirements You are underwater and adjacent to a creature that is at least one size larger than you, has a swim Speed, and is willing to be your mount.

feats.name: Ritual Reversion
feats.description: You can temporarily revert to a less conspicuous form without diminishing your senses.

feats.name: Runtsage
feats.description: Unlike most of your kind, who dismiss goblins as embarrassments or expendable annoyances, you have studied the methodology behind their irresponsible and incomprehensible actions.

feats.name: Scar-Thick Skin
feats.description: Glorious, storied scars cover and protect much of your body, girding you in fleshly armor that resists any wound weaker than those you have already survived.

feats.name: Scion of Many Planes
feats.description: The long and complicated history of your bloodline manifests in your ability to draw power from more planar sources than most other nephilim.

feats.name: Scorching Disarm
feats.description: You channel fire through your hands when you grapple or disarm. On a successful Athletics check to Disarm or Grapple, you also deal 1d6 fire damage.

feats.name: Scurry!
feats.description: Trigger You roll initiative. Your instincts to move to safety are strong. You Stride; you must end your movement in a location where you have cover from at least one enemy you can see, and you can't take this action if it's impossible for you to do so. You ca…

feats.name: Sealed Poppet
feats.description: You've reinforced your interior parts with sealant or other flame-retardant materials, protecting you from fire. You no longer have the weakness to fire from the flammable ability. Special You can't take this feat if you're a stuffed poppet.

feats.name: Secondary Adaptation
feats.description: You've continued to adapt to the rigors of your environment by continuing your metamorphosis, even as an adult. Choose one surki heritage that you don't already have; you gain that heritage and its benefits.

feats.name: Sense Allies
feats.description: Like many humans raised in a close-knit community, you have always been strongly attuned to the presence of others. You are always aware of the presence and location of all allies and creatures friendly to you within 60 feet, even if they are hidden or invisible.

feats.name: Shadowplay
feats.description: Requirements Your last action was a melee Strike that damaged your opponent.

feats.name: Shadowy Disguise
feats.description: You wrap yourself in shadow to change your appearance. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Disguise] as a 1st-rank occult innate spell once per day. This spell gains the shadow trait.

feats.name: Shame the Sin
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You critically hit a demon with a Strike.

feats.name: Shared Luck (Halfling)
feats.description: You are evidence that it's lucky to travel with a halfling.

feats.name: Shed Tail
feats.description: Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed].

feats.name: Sheltering Slab
feats.description: The stone around you is your ally, and you have learned to use it to shore up your weaknesses.

feats.name: Shifting Faces
feats.description: Frequency once per day You wear many faces, even those that don't belong to you.

feats.name: Shoki's Argument
feats.description: You feel a connection to shokis, the rambling collectors of wayward souls, and might have found old texts written by one.

feats.name: Signature Weapon
feats.description: Your energy saturates one of your weapons; it might be one inherited or one tied to your history.

feats.name: Skilled Climber
feats.description: You can navigate vertical surfaces with ease. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet. If you also have the Scuttle Up ancestry feat, your climb Speed increases to your land Speed when climbing trees or cavern walls.

feats.name: Skilled Swimmer
feats.description: You move through the water with ease, mastering your movements with years of practice. When in an aquatic environment, you ignore difficult terrain. In addition, swimming up or down isn't difficult terrain for you.

feats.name: Skillful Climber
feats.description: You can scamper up or down surfaces as nimbly as a monkey. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet. If you have the Climber's Tail ancestry feat, your total climb Speed increases to your land Speed when climbing trees.

feats.name: Skillful Tail
feats.description: Geniekin You were born with a tail, and with practice you've learned how to perform simple Interact actions with it, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Skin Split
feats.description: Frequency once per day You claw open the top layer of your scales and peel off the premature shed in order to remove harmful substances from your skin.

feats.name: Slip with the Breeze
feats.description: You create gusts of wind when you jump, allowing you to carry yourself across greater distances. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Quick Jump] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Powerful Leap] skill feats as bonus feats.

feats.name: Smoke Through Bamboo
feats.description: You've spent significant time slipping silently between bamboo thickets, and your light-footedness allows you to navigate even the thickest forests and brush with ease.

feats.name: Snare Genius
