feats.description: If the snare normally takes 1 minute to Craft, you can Craft it with 3 Interact actions instead.

feats.name: Soaring Flight
feats.description: Frequency once per round You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 20 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

feats.name: Spark Fist
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Spark of Independence
feats.description: You touch a creature with the minion trait and share the heightened sense of autonomy you've discovered.

feats.name: Speak with Flowers
feats.description: At your very heartwood, you're a flower animated by elder magic, and with a little effort, you can speak to your kindred. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with flowering plants of all types.

feats.name: Speak with Kindred
feats.description: You have a connection with creatures that share your physiology.

feats.name: Speak with the Sleeping
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin You can speak to all inanimate objects and the slumbering spirits within them.

feats.name: Speaker in Training
feats.description: You've begun your training as a Speaker. Select divine or primal. If you selected divine, you're a Faithspeaker. If you selected primal, you're a Greenspeaker. If you've already made this decision (such as due to being a budding speaker) you must select the s…
prerequisites: budding speaker centaur heritage or the ability to cast a divine or primal spell

feats.name: Spell Survivor
feats.description: Once you've resisted an opponent's magic, anything else they throw your way becomes less effective.

feats.name: Spirit Soother
feats.description: You are attuned to the minute sounds and sensations of restless spirits.

feats.name: Springing Leaper
feats.description: Your powerful legs allow you to make sudden and dramatic leaps.

feats.name: Statue Form
feats.description: An inconspicuous statue in front of a shop is the perfect form to wait for things to blow over.

feats.name: Steam Spell
feats.description: You transform your fire spells into steam, making them more effective underwater.

feats.name: Stem the Tide
feats.description: You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Protector Tree] as a 1st-rank primal innate spell once per day. At 7th level, the spell is heightened to 2nd rank, and every 2 levels thereafter, the spell is heightened an additional spell rank.

feats.name: Step Lively
feats.description: Trigger A Large or larger enemy ends a move action adjacent to you. You are an expert at avoiding the lumbering footsteps of larger creatures. You Step to another space adjacent to the enemy.

feats.name: Stone Body
feats.description: Your body is like stone. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC when you use the Defend action or raise a shield.

feats.name: Storming Gaze
feats.description: You can open or energize a notable third eye on your forehead to strike with storming power.

feats.name: Stretching Reach
feats.description: You can leverage your size and muscle to extend your reach and attack more distant foes. While in this stance, when you wield a melee weapon that requires two hands and doesn't have reach, the weapon gains a reach of 10 feet.

feats.name: Strix Vengeance
feats.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Trigger You, or a strix ally you can see, are damaged by an enemy's critical hit.

feats.name: Strong of Wing
feats.description: You can fly with a greater distance. The fly Speed you gain from Take Flight increases to 25 feet.

feats.name: Strong Tail
feats.description: From sheer necessity, you've gotten surprisingly good at moving around on land. Your tail is unusually muscular and lets you hop or slither on land at a modest speed. Your land Speed increases to 15 feet.

feats.name: Swamp Stealth
feats.description: Requirements You are in a swamp environment near an environmental feature that would allow you to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Take Cover].

feats.name: Swift Swimmer
feats.description: You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet. Special If you have the wetlander lizardfolk heritage, your swim Speed instead increases to 25 feet.

feats.name: Swimming Poppet
feats.description: Your fins, flippers, or other accessories assist with steering you through water. You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Tail Snatch
feats.description: You can whip your tail around to lash items from the unwary's grip.

feats.name: Tail Spin
feats.description: You excel at using your tail as a weapon to upend your foes.

feats.name: Taste Blood
feats.description: You retain not only your vampiric parent's taste for blood but their ability to gain vitality from it.
prerequisites: Cel Rau, Straveika, Svetocher, or another lineage from a vampire with the Drink Blood ability

feats.name: Tenacious Jaws
feats.description: Your teeth are curved or hooked to hold on to your enemies.

feats.name: Tenacious Net
feats.description: Escaping your nets is no simple task. The Athletics DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Force Open] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape] your nets increases from 16 to 18. After a creature you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Gr…

feats.name: Tengu Feather Fan
feats.description: You've learned to bind some of your feathers together into a fan to focus your ancestral magic.

feats.name: The Moon Weaver's Art
feats.description: You've learned to create minor illusions by collecting strands of moonlight and weaving them together to create small images or cloaking veils.

feats.name: Thousand-Year Grudge
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You succeed at a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Demoralize] check.

feats.name: Thrown Voice
feats.description: You've learned how to throw your voice through the winds, tricking others as to your location.

feats.name: Tikling Bird Twirl
feats.description: Trigger You roll a critical hit on a melee Strike against an enemy.

feats.name: Tip the Scales
feats.description: You're a cunning adversary in close quarters and are well-versed in hit-and-run tactics that exploit the advantages of your small stature.

feats.name: Tomb-Watcher's Glare
feats.description: When you critically hit an undead creature, or an undead creature critically fails a saving throw against one of your abilities, you drive your divine wrath home in your enemy's heart.

feats.name: Tongue Disarm
feats.description: You lash out with your tongue to disarm your foe. You attempt to Disarm a creature within 10 feet, ignoring the requirement that you must have at least one hand free.

feats.name: Torch Goblin
feats.description: You've spent enough time on fire that you know how to use it to your advantage.

feats.name: Tough Tumbler
feats.description: You've taken your share of licks while scurrying around the battlefield and know how to defend yourself against opportunistic attackers.

feats.name: Towering Presence
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You fill an area with your force of will, towering beyond where your true form should be.

feats.name: Traditional Resistances
feats.description: Due to your blood, you have some resistance to certain types of magic. You gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saves against spells and other magical effects from the same tradition as your lineage. This bonus increases to +2 against sleep and paralysis effects.
prerequisites: Arcane Dragonblood, Divine Dragonblood, Occult Dragonblood, or Primal Dragonblood

feats.name: Tranquil Sanctuary
feats.description: Whenever possible, you follow the serene path and encourage others to do the same. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sanctuary] once per day as a 1st-rank divine innate spell.

feats.name: Transposable Compliance
feats.description: Your protean vitality is fecund and many-succoring: your veins run with life-giving ichor that adapts to the blood and physiology of any body, and your skin molts on command, creating wound-stanching sheaths of tissue for yourself and others.

feats.name: Treacherous Earth
feats.description: Frequency once every 10 minutes You have the power to shatter the earth into a shape of your devising. You crack the ground beneath you, creating difficult terrain in a @Template[burst|distance:5] centered on one corner of your space.

feats.name: Tree Climber (Goblin)
feats.description: Your time in forest or jungle canopies has taught you how to scramble across branches with sure feet.
prerequisites: tailed goblin or treedweller goblin heritage

feats.name: Tree's Ward
feats.description: You've lived among trees for so long they recognize your presence and seek to protect you from harm. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Protector Tree] as a primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Treespeech
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood allows you to communicate with trees in the Universe in Muan, the language of wood elementals. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with woody plants like trees and shrubs.

feats.name: Tripkee Glide
feats.description: Requirements You must have at least one hand free.

feats.name: Tunnel Roll
feats.description: You can more easily navigate underground tunnels by rolling up into a ball.

feats.name: Unassuming Heroes
feats.description: Frequency once per day Access peachchild leshy heritage You have a talent for making friends through simple kindness, often among stray animals or other creatures that people tend to overlook, and your inherent magic can make these acts take on additional pow…

feats.name: Uncanny Awareness
feats.description: You have a keen sense of movement around you. You gain motion sense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet. Motion sense allows you to detect nearby motion through vibration and air movement.

feats.name: Undead Companion
feats.description: Your companion is also touched by undeath, a mix of a traditional companion and a skeleton, zombie, or stranger form of unlife.

feats.name: Undead Slayer
feats.description: Your knowledge of your own not-quite-living anatomy, combined with your experience in combat, helps you take down undead foes with ease.

feats.name: Unlock Secret
feats.description: You delve deeper into your psychic potential. Choose a 1st-rank occult spell, either a common spell or another to which you have access. You can cast that spell once per day as an innate occult spell.

feats.name: Urban Jungle
feats.description: Cities are just a new form of wilderness. You've adapted to this wilderness and now can navigate it as easily as where you once came from. When in an urban area, you can move at your full Speed while you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Track] and you c…

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Trickery
feats.description: You've learned how to trick your foes using vanara weapons. Whenever you critically hit using a bo staff, chakram, katar, panabas, urumi, or vanara weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Vandal
feats.description: You have a knack for breaking and dismantling things.

feats.name: Venom Gulp
feats.description: You can store prepared venom in your throat and spit it at your foes in addition to your own toxic spray.

feats.name: Venom Spit
feats.description: You've learned the art of lobbing toxic spittle at vulnerable spots on your foes, especially the eyes.

feats.name: Victorious Vigor
feats.description: Trigger You bring a foe to 0 Hit Points Your victories in battle fill you with pride and imbue you with the energy to fight a bit longer despite your wounds. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Arts
feats.description: You are graceful and efficient in the use of vishkanyan weapons. Whenever you critically hit using a blowgun, fighting fan, kris, kukri, shuriken, or vishkanya weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Voice of the Elements
feats.description: You inherit a primal dragon's bond to base elements.

feats.name: Vomit Stomach
feats.description: Trigger You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened] condition or fail a saving throw against an ingested poison.

feats.name: Vulpine Scamper
feats.description: You're especially nimble while in your full fox shape.

feats.name: Ward Against Corruption
feats.description: Your Boneyard connection wards against unholy corruption. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against death effects, negative effects, and effects from undead.

feats.name: Warding Jewel
feats.description: A life of hunting and battle has caused your head gem to attune to the waxing moon, which has manifested in the power to protect you from harm.

feats.name: Warp Likeness
feats.description: Frequency once per minute Requirements You hit a creature with a melee Strike on your last action.

feats.name: Water Conjuration
feats.description: You carry the ocean with you wherever you go. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Create Water] as a primal innate spell once per day. Each time you cast create water , you choose if you create fresh water or salt water.

feats.name: Wavetouched Paragon
feats.description: You have been blessed by the sea, granting you the ability to swim like a fish. You gain a 15-foot swim Speed. Special If you have the Bonuwat Wavetouched background, you can take this feat at 1st level instead of 5th.

feats.name: Well of Potential
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your mind is a deep well of psychic potential. You regain 1 Focus Point, up to your usual maximum.
prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a kashrishi heritage or ancestry feat that shares a tradition with at least one of your focus spells

feats.name: Well-Armed
feats.description: Your detachable limbs offer flexibility. You Interact to remove your arm and wield it in the other one, increasing your reach by 5 feet for any one-handed weapon held in that arm. If your next action is a Strike with that weapon, creatures that were outside y…

feats.name: Well-Groomed
feats.description: You are fastidious about keeping clean. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against diseases. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a disease, you get a critical success instead. If you have a different ability that would improve the s…

feats.name: Wild Stride
feats.description: Requirements You have a free hand. You can move quickly when using your preferred modes of travel. Stride twice. You gain a +5-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed for these Strides, or a +10-foot circumstance bonus if you have two hands free.

feats.name: Wildborn Adept
feats.description: The whispers of the jungle grant you more diverse access to simple primal magic.

feats.name: Winglets
feats.description: Through the lingering influence of your warren's patron, you've sprouted a small set of wings.

feats.name: Withstand the Storm
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would take cold, electricity, fire, poison, or sonic damage.

feats.name: Zip! Zoom!
feats.description: You can fly longer distances before you need to land. The fly Speed you gain from Take Wing increases to 25 feet.

feats.name: Abjure the False Kin
feats.description: Your vow reminds you that there can be brackish vinegar hiding within honeyed words, helping you detect attempts to influence your mind.

feats.name: Aboleth Transmutation
feats.description: You have tapped into the ancient magic used by alghollthu masters (also known as aboleths) to mold the flesh of your ancestors.

feats.name: Absorb Toxin
feats.description: Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a disease or poison effect that affects an area.
prerequisites: You are not immune to diseases or poisons

feats.name: Accursed Claws
feats.description: Your claws carry your mother's hag magic. When you critically hit with a claw Strike, the target takes an additional 1d4 persistent mental damage.

feats.name: Agathion Magic
feats.description: The harmonious magic of Nirvana flows through you. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Animal Form] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Calm] each once per day as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

feats.name: Aggravating Scratch
feats.description: Your claws carry an irritant that is harmless to you but can be damaging to others. Your claw Strikes deal an additional 1d4 persistent poison damage on a critical hit.

feats.name: Alluring Performance
feats.description: Frequency once per day You command the attention of those around you with an elegant display.

feats.name: Ambush Hunter
feats.description: You are always searching for the perfect opportunity to ambush your enemies.

feats.name: Analyze Information
feats.description: You can stoke your mind into a burst of analytical prowess. You can cast 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hypercognition] once per day as a divine innate spell.

feats.name: Anarchic Arcana
feats.description: The magic in your blood is unpredictable. When you make your daily preparations, roll [[/r 1d12]] twice and consult the following list: 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Acid Grip] 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blur] 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.sp…

feats.name: Ancestral Form
feats.description: Casting your memory back deep into the past, you take the form of an ancestral guardian. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Animal Form] on yourself as a 3rd-rank primal innate spell once per day. You must choose the crocodile form.
prerequisites: bakuwa lizardfolk heritage or makari lizardfolk heritage

feats.name: Ancestral Healer
feats.description: Following the traditions of those who came before you, you've learned how to banish effects that cloud the mind, body, and spirit.

feats.name: Ancillary Motes
feats.description: You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Extraplanar Haze]{Crystalline Dust} one more time per day. Special You can take this feat more than once, gaining one more use of Crystalline Dust per day each time.

feats.name: Animal Magic
feats.description: Your shapeshifting grants you a magical connection to the animal world.

feats.name: Animal Summoner
feats.description: The connection between you and primal magic deepens. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Animal] as a primal innate spell once per day, heightened to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Arcane Camouflage
feats.description: You have developed magical techniques to aid you with stalking your prey.

feats.name: Arcane Propulsion
feats.description: Frequency once per day You redirect energy from your core to ports on your back or feet, allowing you to fly for a short time.

feats.name: Arcane Slam
feats.description: Requirements You have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained].

feats.name: Asura Magic
feats.description: You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blood Vendetta] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Death Knell] once per day each as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

feats.name: Azarketi Purification
feats.description: You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cleanse Cuisine] as a primal innate spell, but only on liquids.

feats.name: Bark and Tendril
feats.description: You wield primal magic. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Entangling Flora] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oaken Resilience] as 2nd-rank primal innate spells once per day each.

feats.name: Battleforger
feats.description: You can sharpen weapons, polish armor, and apply special techniques to temporarily gain better effects from your armaments.

feats.name: Between the Scales
feats.description: You've learned to take advantage of slips in your foes' defenses. When you Strike an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] creature using a melee weapon or unarmed attack that has the agile and finesse traits, it gains the backstabber trait.

feats.name: Big Mouth
feats.description: Instead of storing up to four items of Light Bulk in your cheek pouches, you can store up to 1 Bulk worth of items. The maximum size of a given item is unchanged.

feats.name: Blood Must Have Blood
feats.description: You tap into a bottomless hunger for carnage. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blood Vendetta] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Share Life] as 2nd-rank primal spells, each once per day.

feats.name: Bloodletting Fangs
feats.description: You emulate your vampiric parent's techniques for drawing blood from a victim. Your fangs Strikes deal an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage on a critical hit.

feats.name: Bond Companion
feats.description: You form a close bond with a companion, similar to that of a master and familiar, that lets you gift them with a touch of your inherent magic.

feats.name: Bone Caller
feats.description: Using a mixture of dinosaur bones and the bones of your ancestors to focus your magic, you animate lizards and dinosaurs to carry messages or serve as mounts.

feats.name: Bone Missile
feats.description: You can remove your ribs to use them as arrows or bolts.

feats.name: Breath Like Honey
feats.description: You smell of honey and savory things. Your circumstance bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Make an Impression] if the target can smell your breath increases to +2. In addition, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enthrall…

feats.name: Breath Unleashed
feats.description: You're able to channel more of your draconic benefactor's power and focus it into your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Kobold Breath], increasing its effectiveness but requiring more time to recover.

feats.name: Briar Battler
feats.description: When you're in difficult terrain from an environmental feature, you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Take Cover], even if the feature wouldn't ordinarily be large enough for you to Take Cover.

feats.name: Brightness Seeker
feats.description: Once per day, you can spend 10 minutes studying your surroundings in search of omens related to a particular course of action to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Augury] as an innate divine spell.

feats.name: Brilliant Vision
feats.description: You ignore concealment from clouds, dust, fog, mist, smoke, and similarly loose matter. You can also cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.See the Unseen] as an innate occult spell once per day.

feats.name: Build the First Walls
feats.description: Frequency once per day The powers of creation that run through you allow you to conjure a temporary wall.

feats.name: Call of Elysium
feats.description: The wild wonder of Elysium harmonizes within you, and in dire straits, you can share its benefits with your allies.

feats.name: Cantorian Rejuvenation
feats.description: Frequency once per day The life-giving energy that flows in your blood revitalizes you.

feats.name: Captivating Curiosity
feats.description: You can snare the attentions of onlookers with your unique appearance. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enthrall] as a 3rd-rank occult innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Catrina's Presence
feats.description: You've adopted the calming presence of catrinas, the festive dead; you might have even danced with a catrina yourself! So long as you are visibly carrying fresh flowers or colorful ribbons somewhere on your person, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-sr…

feats.name: Cautious Curiosity
feats.description: You've learned a few magical techniques for getting yourself both into and out of trouble unnoticed.
prerequisites: at least one arcane or occult innate spell gained from a gnome heritage or gnome ancestry feat

feats.name: Cave Climber
feats.description: After years of clambering through caverns, you can climb easily anywhere you go. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Celestial Magic
feats.description: You possess celestial magic. Choose two of the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Clear Mind], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Everlight], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Humanoid Form], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R…
prerequisites: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials

feats.name: Celestial Wings
feats.description: You manifest wings from your planar heritage. Once per day, you gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Ceremony of Aeon's Guidance
feats.description: Your patron aeon has allowed you to call upon their gifts to serve their ends. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Augury] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Calm] each once per day as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

feats.name: Ceremony of Aeon's Shield
feats.description: Your patron aeon graced you with powers of protection. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Resist Energy] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Share Life] each once per day as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

feats.name: Ceremony of Fortification
feats.description: Your exoskeleton arranges itself into an optimal defensive shape.

feats.name: Ceremony of Strengthened Hand
feats.description: Your exoskeleton's weapons are even more potent. If you have a claws unarmed attack, it gains the deadly d8 trait. If you have a branch unarmed attack, it gains the shove and trip traits.

feats.name: Charred Remains
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your next fire spell leaves embers in its wake.

feats.name: Cling
feats.description: Requirements Your last action was a successful Strike and you have a free hand.

feats.name: Close Quarters
feats.description: If you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small or smaller ally. No more than two creatures can share the same space when using this ability or a similar one.

feats.name: Coating of Slime
feats.description: An acidic ooze coats your limbs. Your unarmed attacks deal an additional 1d4 persistent acid damage on a critical hit.

feats.name: Constant Gaze
feats.description: Your eyes keep a continual watch for dangers from all sides. You can't be flanked by creatures of your level or lower, even when you haven't used Watchful Gaze.

feats.name: Consume Magic
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You attempt a saving throw against an area effect from the tradition matching your magiphage ability.

feats.name: Cooperative Soul
feats.description: You have developed a soul-deep bond with your comrades and maintain an even greater degree of cooperation with them. If you are at least an expert in the skill you are Aiding, you get a success on any outcome rolled to Aid other than a critical success.

feats.name: Coral Detoxification
feats.description: Frequency once per hour The coral colony that you've tended has merged with your kidneys to add an additional layer of filtration. Attempt a saving throw against a single poison affecting you with a +2 circumstance bonus.

feats.name: Core Attunement
feats.description: Your core allows you to draw more power from it.

feats.name: Crystalized Mana
feats.description: Your connection to the Plane of Law manifests as crystalline magical energy. You can cast dispel magic as a 3rd-level divine innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Cunning Climber
feats.description: Whether you are climbing a ship's rigging, a jungle tree, or a clock tower, you have an uncanny knack for finding footholds and handholds where larger creatures can't. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Dance of the Tiger
feats.description: Tales tell of the Tiger stalking the Mousedeer for days, hidden and instilling dread upon its prey.

feats.name: Dance Underfoot
feats.description: You dart under the legs of your enemies in combat.

feats.name: Dangle
feats.description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

feats.name: Dangle (Vanara)
feats.description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

feats.name: Daywalker
feats.description: Unlike full vampires, you have fully overcome the sun. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that deal positive damage or that use light. You are no longer dazzled in bright light.

feats.name: Death's Drums
feats.description: Your life has been spent challenging death itself, and proximity to that implacable foe only makes your heart beat harder.

feats.name: Defensive Instincts
feats.description: Requirements you are adjacent to at least two enemies Your body tenses up when surrounded, putting you on edge just enough to anticipate an attack. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the beginning of your next turn and Step.

feats.name: Demolitionist
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar. You know how to destroy objects with a well-placed explosion. Whenever you hit with a bomb Strike against a trap or an unattended object, you ignore the first 5 points of the object's Hardness.

feats.name: Demon Hunter
feats.description: The demons of Tanglebriar have long haunted your dreams, just as they have long threatened Kyonin.
prerequisites: expert in Religion or Demon Lore

feats.name: Dig up Secrets
feats.description: You are an endless well of knowledge and can remember several vital pieces of information at once. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hypercognition] as an innate occult spell once per day.

feats.name: Disorienting Venom
feats.description: The venom injected by your fangs disorients your foes.

feats.name: Dissolution's Sight
feats.description: Frequency Once per hour Accepting your inner darkness means that no outer darkness can obscure your sight. You gain greater darkvision for 1 minute.

feats.name: Divine Countermeasures
feats.description: You've studied your extraplanar heritage with the intent of better defending yourself, whether against creatures aligned with or opposed to your extraplanar lineage, and you've found that your techniques are equally powerful against celestials, fiends, and ot…

feats.name: Divine Wings
feats.description: Frequency once per day With effort, you can call forth magical wings from your back, similar in appearance to those of your extraplanar forebear, whether they be elegantly feathered wings or ominous bat wings.

feats.name: Djinni Magic
feats.description: The magic of djinn runs through your blood. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Gust of Wind] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility] once per day each as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Dracomancer
feats.description: The power infused into you by your draconic benefactor's presence allows you to manifest their most iconic spells.

feats.name: Draconic Paragon
feats.description: Your connection to your draconic benefactor becomes especially pronounced.
prerequisites: Benefactor's Strike, Dracomancer, or Kobold Breath

feats.name: Dragon Grip
feats.description: Your hold has a unique draconic connection. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus when you attempt to Make an Impression on a creature with the dragon trait. You gain access to the Riding Drake animal companion.

feats.name: Dragon Prince
feats.description: The blood of the Dragon Kings runs strong in your veins.

feats.name: Dragonblood Paragon
feats.description: Your draconic anatomy becomes especially pronounced.
prerequisites: strongjaw kobold heritage, venomtail kobold heritage, Dracomancer, or Kobold Breath

feats.name: Drain Emotion
feats.description: You touch an adjacent creature and attempt to draw out its excess emotion.

feats.name: Duskwalker Magic
feats.description: Your connection to psychopomps gives you the power to glimpse the near future and protect corpses from the ravages of undeath.

feats.name: Earthsense
feats.description: Your connection to earth and stone allows you to feel the slightest displacement that disturbs them, down to the shift of a pebble. You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

feats.name: Echoes in Stone
feats.description: Requirements You are standing on a stone or earthen surface. You pause a moment to attune your senses to the stone around you. Until the start of your next turn, you gain imprecise tremorsense with a range of 20 feet.

feats.name: Eerie Compression
feats.description: Your limbs and even your torso can collapse in on themselves, allowing you to fit through tight spaces as though you were a Small creature. You can move at full Speed while Squeezing.

feats.name: Efreeti Magic
feats.description: The magic of your efreeti ancestors flows through you. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Object] once per day each as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Elemental Bulwark
feats.description: You can raise elemental defenses. You gain resistance equal to half your level to acid, cold, electricity, and fire.

feats.name: Elf Step
feats.description: You move in a graceful dance, and even your steps are broad. You Step 10 feet instead of 5 feet.

feats.name: Embodied Dragoon Subjectivity
feats.description: When your allies call for swift reinforcements or lightning raids, you're ready to answer.

feats.name: Emissary Assistance
feats.description: As an emissary, you have assisted land-bound creatures in journeying underwater to visit your settlements.

feats.name: Endless Memories
feats.description: You've lived a thousand lives and done a hundred-thousand things.

feats.name: Energize Bite
feats.description: Requirements Your most recent action was to use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Breath of the Dragon (Dragonblood)]{Breath of the Dragon}.

feats.name: Energy Blessed
feats.description: Energy runs through your blood more powerfully.

feats.name: Envenom Strike
feats.description: You spit venom onto a weapon you're holding or a weapon held by a willing creature within 30 feet; you can also use this ability to envenom your nagaji fangs unarmed attack.
prerequisites: you possess a Strike from a nagaji heritage or ancestry feat that deals poison damage

feats.name: Evade Doom
feats.description: You can elude supernatural disaster. When you would gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed] condition, you can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17] check. On a success, you don't gain the doomed condition.

feats.name: Evolved Spellhorn
feats.description: Your inborn arcane power grows. Choose one common 1st-rank arcane spell and one common 2nd-rank arcane spell. You can cast each of these spells once per day as arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Expert Longevity
feats.description: You've continued to refine the knowledge and skills you've gained through your life. When you select a skill to become trained in with Ancestral Longevity, you can also choose a skill you're trained in and become an expert in it until the next time you prepare. At 15th level, you can also choose a skill you're an expert in and become a master in it until the next time you prepare.

feats.name: Extraplanar Cloud
feats.description: When you use Extraplanar Haze, you can spend 1 additional action to disperse the particles as a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] cloud centered on you instead of as a haze; the activity gains the concentrate trait.

feats.name: Fade Away
feats.description: Your ability to blend into the background allows you to fade away entirely or appear innocuous even to magical effects.

feats.name: Fell Rider
feats.description: You have trained with your animal companion to become a terrifying juggernaut on the battlefield.

feats.name: Ferocious Gust
feats.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes With heavy wing beats, you whip up a furious gust and direct it at your opponents.

feats.name: Ferocious Will
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You succeed at a saving throw against a magical mental effect.

feats.name: Fey Ascension
feats.description: The fey influence on your form and features grows even more powerful and notable.

feats.name: Fey Magic
feats.description: You can use faerie magic to hide yourself and expose hidden foes. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Faerie Fire] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility] each once per day as primal innate spells.

feats.name: Fiend-Trampling Stature
feats.description: Fiends unfortunate enough to be trampled beneath your feet or rent within your grasp are swiftly granulated into bone kindling and blood powder, and the pain of your strikes prevents them from action.

feats.name: Fiendish Magic
feats.description: You possess fiendish magic. Choose two of the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Disguise Magic], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.False Vitality], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd…
prerequisites: Grimspawn, Pitborn, Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends

feats.name: Fierce Competitor
feats.description: Frequency once per day You challenge a single ally to a physical competition.

feats.name: First World Adept
feats.description: Over time your fey magic has grown stronger. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Revealing Light] as 2nd-rank primal innate spells. You can cast each of these primal innate spells once per day.
prerequisites: at least one primal innate spell

feats.name: Fleeing Shriek
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You let out an ear-piercing screech.

feats.name: Flower Magic
feats.description: Certain magics in the world flow easily through your sap.

feats.name: Flowering Path
feats.description: Frequency once per day Vitality and elemental wood flows out from your body and into the earth, infusing it with a stream of new life.

feats.name: Forever Among Humanity
feats.description: Passing unseen within society is second nature to you now. You can use Among Humanity three times per day instead of once per day.

feats.name: Formidable Breath
feats.description: Thanks to rigorous breathing exercises and a diet similar to that of your lineage, your magical breath is more powerful. The area of your Breath of the Dragon increases to 30 feet for a cone or 60 feet for a line, and the damage dice are d6s instead of d4s.

feats.name: Fortified Mind
feats.description: Your mind is unusually resilient and resistant to influence.

feats.name: Fortuitous Shift
feats.description: You have grown more comfortable with your penchant for supernatural disappearance.

feats.name: Four-Armed Aspect
feats.description: Frequency once per day You intone vows to shoulder others' pains; in response, your torso sprouts an additional pair of arms to help you bear those burdens.

feats.name: Fox Arson
feats.description: When you critically hit with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Foxfire] Strike, the target takes an additional 1d4 persistent damage of the same type as the foxfire.

feats.name: Fox Trick
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You always have time for a joke or prank.

feats.name: Freeze It!
feats.description: You are no rime hag or Jadwiga, but the magic of the north has still left a mark on you.

feats.name: Friendly Fling
feats.description: Requirements You are adjacent to an ally. You can scoop up your friends with your horns to hurl them across the battlefield. Pick up an adjacent willing ally who is smaller than you and toss them to an unoccupied space you can see within 20 feet. Since you ar…

feats.name: Full Flight
feats.description: Your flight is unbound, as natural as it was before you were awakened. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

feats.name: Fully Flighted
feats.description: You can take to the skies at any time. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times. Special You can take this feat a second time. If you do, your fly Speed increases to 35 feet.

feats.name: Garuda Magic
feats.description: You are descended from the wondrous garudas, and their keen senses manifest in your magical prowess.

feats.name: Ghostly Resistance
feats.description: Your duskwalker nature gives you resistance against the attacks of the dead. You gain resistance to negative damage equal to half your level.

feats.name: Glory and Valor!
feats.description: Frequency once per day You call upon your ascendant blood with a mighty cry that fills you with a revitalizing energy for 1 minute or until you critically fail a Strike, whichever comes first.

feats.name: Goblin Club
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can summon a mass of magic energy in your hand that, naturally, you use to smack those who offend you.

feats.name: Goring Charge
feats.description: Driven by the momentum of your thundering steps and powerful mass, your horns can pierce your foes. Stride twice, then make a horns Strike. If you moved at least 20 feet from your starting position, your horns Strike also deals 1d6 persistent bleed damage.

feats.name: Grand Metamorphosis
feats.description: One of your nodes has adapted into a new magic-emitting organ.

feats.name: Grandmother's Wisdom
feats.description: You carry the bones of your ancestors with you, and you can ask them for counsel. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Augury] twice per day as a 2nd-rank occult innate spell.

feats.name: Greater Transformation
feats.description: You can assume your oni form more easily, and with greater benefits. Your oni form lasts for 10 minutes without the need to Sustain it. While in your oni form, your reach increases by 5 feet.

feats.name: Green Dash
feats.description: Frequency Once per 10 minutes Requirements You're adjacent to a tree, shrub, or plant that occupies at least a 5-foot square.

feats.name: Gripping Limbs
feats.description: Nodules, hooks, or claws on your limbs allow you to cling to surfaces with ease. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Group Aid
feats.description: Your upbringing emphasized teamwork and helping your allies comes naturally to you. When you use the Aid reaction, you can grant your bonus to all allies who attempt the same triggering check, not just one ally.

feats.name: Grow Tool
feats.description: You grow a simple tool from your own body, coaxing flowers, vines, roots, and wood to grow and sprout from your flesh into the desired shape.
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait

feats.name: Guarded Thoughts
feats.description: Your mind, like a dark naga's, foils attempts to read your thoughts.

feats.name: Guiding Luck
feats.description: Your luck guides you to look the right way and aim your blows unerringly. You can use Halfling Luck twice per day: once in response to its normal trigger, and once when you fail a Perception check or attack roll instead of the normal trigger.

feats.name: Hag Magic
feats.description: Your hag heritage manifests as occult magic. You can cast curse of lost time and illusory disguise each once per day as 2nd-level occult innate spells.

feats.name: Hardy Traveler
feats.description: There's no journey too far or burden too heavy when you have friends at your side or hope within your heart. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to Speed and reduce the penalty from being encumbered by 5.

feats.name: Hefting Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow can contain objects. You can Interact with your shadow to store or retrieve objects, just like you would a mundane container (meaning you spend two Interact actions total to store and then retrieve the object, for example). Your shadow can contain…

feats.name: Heir of the Saoc
feats.description: In the past, you would have been a proud initiate of the Saoc Brethren.

feats.name: Helpful Halfling
feats.description: When you aid a friend with a task, you find many ways to help and avoid interfering.

feats.name: Herbal Forager
feats.description: Your skill with herbs has improved. Each day as part of your daily preparations, you can harvest ingredients from your surroundings to craft one temporary alchemical item you know the formula for. This alchemical item must have the healing trait. If not consu…

feats.name: Hero's Wings
feats.description: Your wings have grown to their full, majestic form, granting you the unlimited power of flight.

feats.name: Heroes' Call
feats.description: The songs of ancient heroes echo through your mind and quicken your pulse, especially in dire straits.

feats.name: Home in the Deep
feats.description: You cut through the water, and dwell beneath the surface with ease. Increase your swim Speed by 15 feet; you also gain the amphibious trait.

feats.name: Hone Claws
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You grind or gnaw a particularly wicked edge onto your claws. The next claws Strike you hit and deal damage with deals an additional 1d6 bleed damage. You cannot have more than one instance of Hone Claws active at a time.

feats.name: Horn and Bone Incantation
feats.description: You invoke mantras of tellurian rebirth. You gain the ability to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Animal Form] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Humanoid Form] as 2nd-rank primal innate spells, each once per day.

feats.name: Hungry Goblin
feats.description: You'll eat anything and anyone. Whenever you inflict @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Persistent Damage]{Persistent Bleed Damage} with your jaws unarmed attack, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half your level for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.pf2…

feats.name: Hypnotic Gaze
feats.description: You can widen your field of vision, allowing you to affect more creatures with your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Hypnotic Lure].

feats.name: I Will Return
feats.description: Your special connection to death and rebirth allows you to sense when it's your time to enter the Great Beyond, and now isn't the time.

feats.name: Iivlar's Deflection
feats.description: Trigger You are struck by a critical hit that deals physical damage.

feats.name: Ill Tide
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 30 feet of you critically fails an attack roll, skill check, or saving throw Some land dwellers say that merfolk are bad luck.

feats.name: Improvisational Warrior
feats.description: When you use an improvised weapon, you apply the critical specialization of a brawling weapon to it. Depending on the shape and nature of the improvised weapon, your GM might determine another weapon group's critical specialization is more appropriate.

feats.name: Incredible Improvisation
feats.description: A stroke of brilliance gives you a major advantage with a skill despite your inexperience. Gain a +4 circumstance bonus to the triggering skill check.

feats.name: Inner Breath
feats.description: Your body is capable of recycling its own air. When you hold your breath, you can do so for an additional hour. At the end of this hour, your body needs to rest before it can recycle air again. This rest requires 10 minutes of exposure to breathable air.

feats.name: Inner Fire
feats.description: The fire within you blazes forth. Once per day, you can cast fireball as a 3rd-level arcane innate spell.

feats.name: Internal Respirator
feats.description: Your body can internally synthesize oxygen for limited periods of time.

feats.name: Into the Sky
feats.description: You fly as naturally as any dragonet. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

feats.name: Invoke the Elements
feats.description: Frequency once per day You summon an aura of shimmering heat, flurrying snow, crashing waves, or swirling wind and lightning.
prerequisites: Brine May, Snow May, Veil May, or Virga May

feats.name: Iron Body
feats.description: Your body becomes as hard as iron briefly. Once per day, you can gain resistance to all physical damage equal to your level for 1 minute.

feats.name: Irrepressible (Halfling)
feats.description: You are easily able to ward off attempts to play on your fears and emotions.

feats.name: Jalmeri Rakshasa Magic
feats.description: You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dispel Magic] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Reaper's Lantern] once per day each as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

feats.name: Janni Hospitality
feats.description: You can use magic to show others desert hospitality. You can cast 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Create Food] once per day and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Create Water] twice per day as arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Janni Magic
feats.description: The magic of jann runs through your blood. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Speak with Animals] once per day each as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Jotun's Boost
feats.description: Requirements You have at least one hand free and are adjacent to an ally.

feats.name: Kizidhar Magic
feats.description: You can wield the arcane magic of a kizidhar, casting @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Entangling Flora] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.One with Plants] once per day each as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Kneel for No God
feats.description: Access Vahird ethnicity Your ancestors' defiance of magic and your people's strictly egalitarian mindset mean that certain forms of magic have little effect on you.

feats.name: Kodama Call
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin The small spirits known as kodama pride themselves in taking care of trees and other vegetation, and they'll happily come to your aid as well.

feats.name: Larcenous Tail
feats.description: You can perform minor mischief with your tail.

feats.name: Laughing Kholo
feats.description: Your sinister giggle is a sound of warning and threat.

feats.name: Legendary Size
feats.description: The vanaras of old were tricksters able to step across wide rivers or slip into impossibly small spaces.

feats.name: Lesser Augmentation
feats.description: You know how to get the most out of your unique body and abilities.

feats.name: Life Leap
feats.description: Requirements You must be adjacent to a living creature.

feats.name: Life's Blood
feats.description: Your journey to enlightenment has made your blood possess nigh-immortal properties, allowing you to heal others.

feats.name: Luck of the Clowder
feats.description: When you use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat's Luck] to reroll, any creatures you choose within 10 feet who also just failed against the same effect (such as a single spell) can also reroll their saving throws and use the better result.

feats.name: Lucky Keepsake
feats.description: You have a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Lucky Keepsake]{Keepsake} that grants you luck.

feats.name: Many Faces
feats.description: Frequency three times per day Putting on a new face offers a great way to get a fresh perspective on life.

feats.name: Many Guises (Kitsune)
feats.description: You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Shifting Faces] three times per day instead of once per day.

feats.name: Marid Magic
feats.description: You channel the magic of marids. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hydraulic Push] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mist] each once per day as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Mask of Pain
feats.description: Trigger You succeed at a Demoralize check.

feats.name: Memory of Skill
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your years of training in a previous life didn't go to waste with your death, and you can call upon this training when you most need it.

feats.name: Mentor of Legends
feats.description: You're an extraordinary teacher, capable of inspiring your students to amazing feats of athletics and ingenuity.

feats.name: Methodical Magic
feats.description: You can reorder the world with your magic.

feats.name: Mineral Deposits
feats.description: Precious metals from your bloodstream line your claws, jaws, or the tip of your tail, and you're able call upon your blood to surge and empower your attacks.

feats.name: Miraculous Repair
feats.description: Geniekin can't grant magical wishes, but some echo of power lingers within you.

feats.name: Mirror Refuge
feats.description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're within 5 feet of a mirrored surface.

feats.name: Moderate Enhance Venom
feats.description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Envenom] to moderate vishkanyan venom.

feats.name: Moisture Bath
feats.description: Frequency one per day Your moist skin is especially resistant to damage from temperature-altering effects.

feats.name: Moray Eel Mount
feats.description: You have either trained a giant moray eel since its hatching or have tamed one in the wild.

feats.name: Morrigna's Spider Affinity
feats.description: Much like morrignas, you feel an affinity for spiders.

feats.name: Mother's Mindfulness
feats.description: Frequency once per minute Trigger An adjacent ally is hit by an attack.

feats.name: Mountain's Stoutness
feats.description: Your hardiness lets you withstand more punishment than most.

feats.name: Mud Boat's Passage
feats.description: You instinctively create magical boats that keep your feet dry (mostly).

feats.name: Multitalented
feats.description: You've learned to split your focus between multiple classes with ease. You gain a 2nd-level multiclass dedication feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype.

feats.name: Natural Magnetism
feats.description: Your connection with elemental iron grants you a natural field of weak magnetic attraction.

feats.name: Night Magic
feats.description: You can tap into the magic that runs through your blood.

feats.name: No Evidence
feats.description: You leave little sign when attempting to remain unseen. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Avoid Notice], you also gain the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Cover Tracks] unless you choose not to.

feats.name: Nodal Healing
feats.description: You can induce wound repair by circulating magic throughout your body.

feats.name: Occult Resistance
feats.description: Your study of occult practices has shown you how to best defend against them. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against occult effects.

feats.name: Offensive Subroutine
feats.description: Nanites augment your attacks. You can choose to activate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Nanite Surge] when you attempt an attack roll, instead of when you attempt a skill check. If you do, you gain a +1 status bonus to the triggering attack roll.

feats.name: Oni Strength
feats.description: Your oni heritage manifests as supernatural physical might. Once per day when you deal damage with a melee Strike, you can add your level as additional damage.

feats.name: Otherworldly Acumen
feats.description: The arcane magic you possess grows in power and complexity. Choose one 1st-level arcane spell. You can cast it as an arcane innate spell once per day.
prerequisites: at least one innate spell gained from an elf ancestry feat

feats.name: Overcrowd
feats.description: As long as you are Small, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small ally. Only two creatures total can share the same space when using this ability or a similar one.

feats.name: Pack Tactics
feats.description: You have mastered how to hunt with your pack. If an enemy is within reach of you and at least two of your allies, that enemy is off-guard against you.

feats.name: Paralyzing Jewel
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your dedication to the ideals of art and beauty allows your head gem to access the power of the waning moon.

feats.name: Perfume Cloud
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You issue a cloud of your fragrance like a full-body sneeze—but one that might save your life as the powerful perfume makes your attackers' eyes sting and water.

feats.name: Persistent Odor
feats.description: Your pheromones now linger on creatures. When a target fails its save against your Emit Defensive Odor ability, they also take @Damage[(floor((@actor.level -1)/4) - 1)d6[persistent,poison]] damage. The damage increases to 2d6 at 13th level and 3d6 at 17th lev…

feats.name: Pervasive Superstition
feats.description: You distrust and resist magic with an almost supernatural intensity. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against spells and magical effects at all times.

feats.name: Phantom Orchestra
feats.description: An easy way to trick others is to throw your voice into a nearby forest or thicket to make strange noises.

feats.name: Piercing Quills
feats.description: Your quills can dig particularly deep into the flesh of your opponents. Your quills unarmed attack deals @Damage[1d4[bleed]] on a critical hit.

feats.name: Pinch Time
feats.description: One of your parents has a human life span and another an elven life span, with your own somewhere between.

feats.name: Plane Step
feats.description: You temporarily move just beyond the threshold of the current plane, granting you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealment} until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Political Virtuoso
feats.description: Your mastery of the politics of your home nation is profound. Your circumstance bonus from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Political Acumen] becomes +4 instead of +2.

feats.name: Pollinate
feats.description: Trigger You take bludgeoning damage. As you're hit, you emit a dense cloud of pollen, obscuring you from sight. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] until the beginning of your next turn. Special This feat gains the trait for your a…
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait

feats.name: Predator's Growl
feats.description: Trigger You successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Seek] a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Undetected] creature.

feats.name: Predator's Instinct
feats.description: Your animal nature grants you deadly predatory instincts. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls when using Perception, and you can always use Perception for initiative even when ambushed.

feats.name: Preemptive Reconfiguration
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would take bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage.

feats.name: Pride in Arms
feats.description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet brings an enemy to 0 Hit Points.

feats.name: Qlippoth Magic
feats.description: You've deeply studied the secrets of your blood and can force reality to act against its own wishes. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blur] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Silence] once per day each as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

feats.name: Quick Recovery
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins, and you have the wounded condition. You use your command over your form to repair life-threatening wounds. Reduce your wounded condition by 1.

feats.name: Quietus Strikes
feats.description: Your connection to the Boneyard empowers you to bring death to all forms of life and unlife, exploiting their weaknesses.

feats.name: Quill Spray
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can launch a mass of quills at opponents.
prerequisites: quillcoat shisk or quill unarmed attack

feats.name: Ragdya's Dance
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger An adjacent observed creature succeeds at an attack roll against you.

feats.name: Rain of Bolts
feats.description: Frequency once per day Throughout the day, your body produces powerful projectiles within your chassis.

feats.name: Rakshasa Magic
feats.description: You remember the secrets of your rakshasa forebears and know how to apply those memories to get results.

feats.name: Rakshasa Ravaged
feats.description: You and your family know well the ravages of rakshasa predations, and you know how to best defend yourself against their growing corruption in the world. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against occult spells.

feats.name: Rat Form
feats.description: You can transform into an innocuous-looking rat. You gain the effects of a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pest Form] spell, but you must assume the battle form of a Tiny rat.

feats.name: Read the Stars
feats.description: You're incredibly skilled in iruxi astrology, and you can gain useful (if cryptic) hints from the stars' alignment.
prerequisites: trained in Astrology Lore or Occultism

feats.name: Rejuvenation Token
feats.description: You tie yourself to the Material Plane by implanting a piece of your consciousness into a weapon, piece of armor, or other item that's precious to you.

feats.name: Repair Module
feats.description: Frequency once per day You trigger your body's repair programming, causing your body's nanites to heal your wounds.

feats.name: Replenishing Hydration
feats.description: You draw life from the water around you. If you submerge in water and rest for 10 minutes, you regain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[((floor(@actor.level/2))*(@actor.abilities.con.mod))[healing]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}.

feats.name: Returning Throw
feats.description: You have mastered the technique of arcing a projectile so that it returns to your hand after being thrown, though this requires a moment to precisely calculate the trajectory and possible ricochets.

feats.name: Ricocheting Leap
feats.description: You quickly use your momentum to topple and spring off of foes.

feats.name: Ride On
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You would gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fatigued] condition.

feats.name: Riptide
feats.description: Requirements You are within 10 feet of water at least 10 feet deep, and your Speed is sufficient to reach the water in one Stride.

feats.name: River Adaptation
feats.description: Webbing sprouts on your legs and tail as you shift to a more aquatic form.

feats.name: Rivethun Spiritual Attunement
feats.description: Access Rivethun Adherent background or you are a member of the Rivethun Your time spent among the Rivethun has heightened your awareness of animate spirits around you, giving you the ability to sense them briefly.

feats.name: Rokoan Arts
feats.description: Ancestral spirits have begun to bond themselves to you, granting you powers characteristic of a rokoa.

feats.name: Roll with It
feats.description: Trigger A foe hits you with a melee weapon or unarmed attack.

feats.name: Rolling White Bottle Form
feats.description: Trigger You Drop Prone or otherwise become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].

feats.name: Rooting
feats.description: You can root yourself to the ground. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus against effects that would forcibly move you or knock you prone while standing on earth or stone.

feats.name: Rouse the Dreaming Relic
feats.description: The spirit within your pusaka resonates with other magical items in your possession.

feats.name: Sash of the Wind
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin At your request, the nature spirits of the air and wind spin themselves into an iridescent sash loosely draped around your shoulders that buoys you through the sky.

feats.name: Scalding Spit
feats.description: Your bodily fluids burn with surprising volatility, as if you ran on oil instead of blood.

feats.name: Scaling Poppet
feats.description: Your construction integrates ropes, hooks, or other tools to help you move across steep surfaces. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Scarlet Strands
feats.description: The innate magic in your blood turns your signature crimson tresses into more than just a stylish coiffure.

feats.name: Sculpt Shadows
feats.description: You coax nearby shadows into the shape of a simple weapon or a simple tool or item, using a tiny piece of your shadow to make it solid; in doing so, you lose 1 Hit Point.

feats.name: Secrets of the Past
feats.description: You've established a stronger connection with your past selves and can play out the memories of your lifetimes in an instant, helping you draw on knowledge that lives deep within your mind.

feats.name: Sense for Trouble
feats.description: You can tell when something's off. You can trigger @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat's Luck] after you roll initiative, in addition to its normal trigger, to reroll your Initiative and take the higher of the two results. This still counts against Cat's…

feats.name: Sense Thoughts
feats.description: You have an even stranger knack for knowing what other people are thinking. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mind Reading] as an innate occult spell once per day.

feats.name: Serpentcoil Slam
feats.description: Frequency once per minute Your people's ancient and storied rivalry with garudas led you to develop special techniques against flying foes.

feats.name: Serpentine Swimmer
feats.description: You undulate your body in a series of sinuous serpentine motions as you swim, drastically improving the speed at which you move through the water. Your swim Speed increases from 10 feet to 25 feet.

feats.name: Shadow Sight
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You draw on your connection with the Shadow Plane to see through all but the deepest darkness. You gain greater darkvision for 1 minute.

feats.name: Shadow Tempo
feats.description: Trigger An ally within your reach uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action they're using.

feats.name: Shaitan Magic
feats.description: The magic of shaitans runs through your blood. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Revealing Light] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Resist Energy] once per day each as 2nd-rank arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Sheltering Wing
feats.description: You raise your fledgling wings to protect you from attack, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and to saving throws against spells that target you until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Shore Gift
feats.description: Using old magic, you slip off your tail like an item of clothing and walk on two feet, resembling a humanoid ancestry, usually human but possibly elf, half-elf, or something stranger.

feats.name: Shory Aeromancer
feats.description: Your ancestors hailed from the flying cities of the Shory, and a few simple tricks have come down through the ages to you. You can cast 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fly] on yourself as an innate arcane spell once per day.

feats.name: Silent Step
feats.description: You Step, then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak]. You still need to meet the requirements to Hide or Sneak, as normal.

feats.name: Siphon Torment
feats.description: Your progenitors suffered greatly at the hands of a curse, a fate you willingly take upon yourself rather than let fall upon others.

feats.name: Siren Song
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can beguile and bewitch with your song.

feats.name: Skeletal Resistance
feats.description: Your body becomes resistant, your hardened bones deflecting weapons and other forms of damage. You gain resistance 2 to cold, electricity, fire, piercing, and slashing damage. This resistance increases to 3 at 13th level and 4 at 17th level.

feats.name: Skittering Scuttle
feats.description: You can scuttle farther and faster when maneuvering alongside allies. When you use Goblin Scuttle, you can Stride up to half your Speed instead of Stepping.

feats.name: Slip Into Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow magic bleeds into the space around you.
prerequisites: ability to cast at least one spell with the darkness trait

feats.name: Slip the Grasp
feats.description: Requirements You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained].

feats.name: Smoke Sight
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Snare Commando
feats.description: Trigger A creature fails or critically fails a save against your snare.

feats.name: Soaring Form
feats.description: You have a fly Speed of 20 feet at all times.

feats.name: Sodbuster
feats.description: Years toiling in soil have made you an expert digger. You gain a burrow Speed of 10 feet through loose soil or dirt.

feats.name: Solar Rejuvenation
feats.description: Ghoran - The warmth and light of the sun gives you life.

feats.name: Solidarity
feats.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes You bestow some of your own life energies to mend damage.

feats.name: Speaker's Defense
feats.description: As a Speaker, you've forged a deep bond with powerful spirits who you can urge to rise up to defend you and your people.
prerequisites: budding speaker centaur heritage or Speaker in Training

feats.name: Spiritual Echo
feats.description: You possess the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, which has begun to resonate with your own.

feats.name: Splinter Self
feats.description: You can briefly split into a duplicate. Once per day, you can cast mirror image as a 2nd-level occult innate spell.

feats.name: Spore Cloud
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You unleash a cloud of pollen or similar spores.

feats.name: Squad Tactics
feats.description: You are adept at working with your allies to surround an enemy. If an enemy is within reach of you and at least two of your allies, that enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to you.

feats.name: Stone Bones
feats.description: Trigger You are struck by a critical hit that deals physical damage. Your intractable nature can help you shrug off even the most grievous injuries. Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17|showDC:all]. If you are successful, the attack becomes a normal hit.

feats.name: Stone Passage
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Calling upon your knowledge of stonework and inherent magic, you momentarily make a section of stone insubstantial, allowing you to pass through.

feats.name: Stonewalker
feats.description: You have a deep reverence for and connection to stone.

feats.name: Strand Strider
feats.description: Your eight legs serve you well when climbing walls and webs alike. You gain a climb speed of 25 feet in your spider shape.

feats.name: Strong Swimmer
feats.description: Your swim Speed increases to match your land Speed.

feats.name: Stubborn Defiance
feats.description: You're brave and stubborn and refuse to back down or bow to the wishes of another. You gain a +1 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.I Defy You!] reaction.

feats.name: Studious Adept
feats.description: You achieve a breakthrough in your exploration of magic.

feats.name: Supernatural Charm
feats.description: Your elven heritage manifests as an otherworldly charisma. You can cast charm as a 1st-level occult innate spell once per day. At 17th level, this is heightened to 4th level.

feats.name: Swift Application
feats.description: You expertly combine the motions of attacking and coating your weapon with venom.

feats.name: Tears of Pearl
feats.description: Frequency once per day You weep, and your tears become gleaming pearls as they fall to the ground, so beautiful others can't help but grab at them.

feats.name: Telekinetic Slip
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger Your turn begins, and you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained].

feats.name: Terrain Advantage
feats.description: Non-lizardfolk creatures in difficult terrain are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to you. If you have a swim Speed, non-lizardfolk creatures that are in water and lack a swim Speed are also off-guard to you.

feats.name: Tetraelemental Assault
feats.description: Your Elemental Assault cycles through all four elements.

feats.name: Thorned Seedpod
feats.description: When your seedpods strike a felling blow, they burst into viciously thorny vines. When you critically succeed at a seedpod Strike, vines twist and stab your foe, dealing 1d4 persistent piercing damage.

feats.name: Tongue Tether
feats.description: Your tongue can momentarily latch on as readily as your hands.

feats.name: Towering Growth
feats.description: You're capable of growing as tall as a pine tree for a short time. You gain 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge] as a primal innate spell. You can cast this spell twice per day and you must target yourself.

feats.name: Transcendent Realization
feats.description: You've unleashed even more of your mind's limitless potential.

feats.name: Tree Climber
feats.description: You've spent much of your life among the treetops and have become an expert at quickly and safely climbing them. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Tree Climber (Elf)
feats.description: You've spent much of your life among the treetops and have become an expert at quickly and safely climbing them. You gain a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Climb] Speed of 10 feet.

feats.name: Tremorsense
feats.description: You gain an imprecise tremorsense with a range of 30 feet. This allows you to sense creatures and objects in contact with the ground.

feats.name: True Dragon's Flight
feats.description: Your wings have grown more powerful, capable of keeping you aloft longer. You have a fly Speed of 20 feet at all times.

feats.name: Two Truths
feats.description: Your ability to imitate your progenitor is so strong, you can even convince yourself.

feats.name: Uncanny Cheeks
feats.description: You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Prescient Consumable] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Prescient Planner] feats, except that you always withdraw the objects from your cheek pouches.

feats.name: Undying Ferocity
feats.description: You resist death's clutches with supernatural vigor, daring death to claim you while promising that any such attempt will surely fail.

feats.name: Unhampered Passage
feats.description: You won't allow others to restrain you. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Unfettered Movement] on yourself as a primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Unleash Yaoguai Might
feats.description: Frequency once per day As you enter your yaoguai form, you draw upon your internal magic to assume an even greater form.

feats.name: Unyielding Disguise
feats.description: When you cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Humanoid Form] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Disguise] to alter your appearance, the spell's duration is 2 hours.
prerequisites: ability to cast humanoid form or illusory disguise

feats.name: Velstrac Magic
feats.description: You know there's so much more to sensation than whips and chains—but whips and chains also have their place.

feats.name: Viper Strike
feats.description: Frequency once per minute You move and attack with a swiftness that most can't follow. You Stride and then Strike. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

feats.name: Virtue-Forged Tattoos
feats.description: Your tattoos are a work of eldritch genius, a masterpiece of art, magic, and skin.

feats.name: Vivacious Conduit
feats.description: Your connection to the First World has grown, and its vital energy flows into you rapidly.

feats.name: Wary Skulker
feats.description: You can perform the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Scout] exploration activity at the same time as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Avoid Notice] exploration activity.

feats.name: Water Dancer
feats.description: You glide through the water with graceful ease. When in an aquatic or swamp environment, you ignore the effects of non-magical difficult terrain. In addition, swimming up or down isn't difficult terrain for you.

feats.name: Water Strider
feats.description: Water cradles your every step, allowing you to walk on its surface.

feats.name: Water Walk
feats.description: You can walk on the surface of water as if it were solid ground. You can walk on the surface of calm water without needing to swim. Running water requires a DC 15 Acrobatics check.

feats.name: Web Hunter
feats.description: Through the careful cultivation of highly sensitive hairs, you've developed the ability to sense creatures without seeing them.

feats.name: Wheedle and Jig
feats.description: You make capering motions and silly sounds to captivate onlookers. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enthrall] as a 3rd-rank arcane innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Whispers in the Night
feats.description: You weave your illusions with greater ability, allowing you to play tricks and slip through the night.

feats.name: Wild Magic
feats.description: Chaos magic surges through you. You can cast confusion as a 4th-level occult innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Wind Form
feats.description: You can become one with the wind. Once per day, you can cast gaseous form as a 3rd-level primal innate spell.

feats.name: Wind God's Fan
feats.description: Your fan can stir up even more powerful winds. You can use the Wave Fan activation one additional time per day. Add a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wall of Wind] spell to the spells contained within your fan.

feats.name: Wing Buffet
feats.description: You have a pair of draconic wings strong enough to batter your foes away and shove them away.

feats.name: Wing Step
feats.description: With a sharp flap of your wings, you stay light on your feet as you move. You Step 5 feet twice.

feats.name: Winglet Flight
feats.description: Frequency once per round Intense use and exercise have made your winglets more powerful. You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 20 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

feats.name: Wings of Air
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can strain to call forth feathered or cloudy wings from your back. Once manifested, these wings remain for 10 minutes. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed while you've manifested your wings.

feats.name: Wings of the Dragon
feats.description: Leathery wings sprout from your back. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed for up to 10 minutes once per day, or you slow fall as if you had cast feather fall.

feats.name: Witness of Earth
feats.description: The primal magic in your soul offers the patient earth's timeless counsel.

feats.name: World-Protector's Hospitality
feats.description: Through your spiritual power, you impede starvation and restore pantries.

feats.name: Adamantine Mantra
feats.description: You attain your true potential as a tutelary spirit. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blessing of Defiance] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Advanced General Training
feats.description: Over the long course of your adventuring life, your adaptability has let you pick up numerous useful abilities. You gain a general feat of 7th level or lower. You must meet the feat's prerequisites.

feats.name: Airy Step
