feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature targets you with an attack or other targeted effect, and you can see the attacker.

feats.name: Aiuvarin Sight
feats.description: Your elven vision has sharpened to an extraordinary degree. You gain darkvision. If you already have darkvision, you gain greater darkvision instead.

feats.name: Alter Resistance
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You take acid, electricity, or sonic damage.

feats.name: Ancestor's Rage
feats.description: You transform into an enormous, otherworldly hyena. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Animal Form] (canine form only) once per day as a 5th-rank occult innate spell.

feats.name: Ancestor's Transformation
feats.description: You can commune with ancestor spirits to assume the form of an enormous primeval strix.

feats.name: Anchoring Arrow
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You can prevent demonic foes from fleeing your wrath via teleportation.

feats.name: Aquatic Adaptation
feats.description: Frequency once per day If you and up to four other creatures are in contact with a body of water deep enough for you to fully submerge, you can spend 10 minutes adapting the creatures to that specific body of water.

feats.name: Aquatic Camouflage
feats.description: You blend into the waves. While fully submerged in water, as long as an observer is at least 20 feet away from you, you don't need cover from that observer to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak].

feats.name: Arboreal Conversationalist
feats.description: Access kijimuna gnome heritage or Tian Xia origin With your close connection to primal energies and the First World, you can communicate with trees.
prerequisites: kijimuna gnome heritage or at least one primal innate spell from a gnome heritage or feat

feats.name: Arcane Locomotion
feats.description: You've modified your body to allow you to augment your movement.

feats.name: Arcane Sight
feats.description: You've trained yourself to constantly be on the lookout for magical effects, even when focusing on looking out for other things.
prerequisites: ability to cast the detect magic cantrip

feats.name: Arise, Ye Worthy!
feats.description: A touch of valkyrie magic in your blood lets you hold back death's grasp. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Breath of Life] as a divine innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Astral Blink
feats.description: You've attuned your core to allow you to phase in and out of the Astral Plane, allowing you to teleport periodically.

feats.name: Attuned Electroreceptors
feats.description: You grow specialized organs that allow you to detect even the faintest of heartbeats.

feats.name: Augment Senses
feats.description: You open vestigial eyes, unfurl tympanic flaps of skin, or otherwise enhance your senses.

feats.name: Avenge Ally
feats.description: Though you know that you will eventually outlive your companions, seeing them at death's door brings clarity to your attacks. When an ally within 30 feet gains the dying condition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your next attack roll against the creature who brought them down.

feats.name: Awaken Others
feats.description: You can awaken others just through contact and communication.

feats.name: Awaken the Obake
feats.description: Not every tool is well cared for, and those that are treated badly might awaken as malevolent spirits.

feats.name: Axiomite Heritage
feats.description: Your connection to Axis deepens. You gain resistance to chaotic damage equal to half your level. You are also immune to the confused condition.

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Your mastery with weapons both above and below water is unmatched.

feats.name: Black Cat Curse
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 30 feet you can see would succeed at a save. You hiss a spiteful curse. The target rerolls the triggering saving throw and use the worse result.

feats.name: Blazing Aura
feats.description: Your body is wreathed in flames you can unleash at will. You can activate a 5-foot emanation that deals 2d6 fire damage to all adjacent creatures (basic Reflex save). The aura lasts for 1 minute and you can use it once per day.

feats.name: Bone Investiture
feats.description: You encase yourself in spiritual dinosaur bones to become a Huge dinosaur. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dinosaur Form] on yourself as a 5th-rank innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Bonekeeper's Bane
feats.description: Whenever an enemy starts its turn adjacent to you, it must attempt a Will saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is highest.

feats.name: Boneyard's Call
feats.description: You can call upon the power of the Boneyard to destroy undead. Once per day, you can cast spirit blast as a 6th-level divine innate spell.

feats.name: Bounce Back
feats.description: You recover from near-death experiences with astounding resilience. When you lose the dying condition, you regain Hit Points equal to twice your level plus your Constitution modifier instead of 0 Hit Points.

feats.name: Calaca's Showstopper
feats.description: Frequency once per day You've spent many an evening learning songs and tales featuring calacas, death's wandering minstrels.

feats.name: Call of the Green Man
feats.description: You can call forth nearby nature spirits to augment your body. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Plant Form] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell. When you reach 17th level, you can heighten the spell to 6th rank when you cast it.

feats.name: Camouflage Coat
feats.description: You've learned to use your natural camouflage to your advantage, enhancing your ability to blend with your surroundings through careful movements and additional markings or attire.

feats.name: Can't Fall Here
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger An adjacent and willing ally would be reduced to 0 HP but not killed.

feats.name: Cannibalize Magic
feats.description: The fey magic inside of you is a vital part of your body, and you can steal other sources of magic to replenish yours.

feats.name: Caterwaul
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger An ally within 30 feet would be reduced to 0 HP but not immediately killed.

feats.name: Ceaseless Shadows
feats.description: You excel at going unnoticed, especially among a crowd.

feats.name: Celestial Mercy
feats.description: Your celestial powers allow you to remove lesser afflictions with ease. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cleanse Affliction] twice per day as a 4th-rank divine innate spell.
prerequisites: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials

feats.name: Celestial Strikes
feats.description: Your connection to good arms all your attacks against forces of evil. All your weapon and unarmed Strikes gain the holy and magical traits.

feats.name: Ceremony of Growth
feats.description: You can alter your exoskeleton's size. You constantly gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge]. You can dismiss or resume these effects as an action, which has the concentrate trait.

feats.name: Cloak of Poison
feats.description: Frequency once per day You secrete a cloak of concentrated poison that harms any who dare attack you. For 1 minute, any creature that touches you or damages you with an unarmed attack or melee weapon without the reach trait takes @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage.

feats.name: Cobble Dancer
feats.description: You know how to take advantage of foes thrown off-balance by unstable flooring, loose cobblestones, or similar impediments. While in an outdoor urban environment, you can Step into difficult terrain and enemies in difficult terrain are off-guard to you.

feats.name: Cold Iron Stomach
feats.description: You have steeled yourself against potent odors.

feats.name: Combined Form
feats.description: Trigger An ally within 30 feet uses a polymorph effect.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Composite Shortbow], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Glaive], @UUID[Compen…

feats.name: Consistent Surge
feats.description: Your nanites are incredibly effective, capable of improving your body's efficiency regularly. You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Nanite Surge] with a frequency of once per 10 minutes, rather than once per hour.

feats.name: Continuous Assault
feats.description: You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Elemental Assault] once per hour instead of once per day.

feats.name: Coral Reserve
feats.description: Frequency once per day Requirements You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fatigued].

feats.name: Core Rejuvenation
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dying] condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

feats.name: Crafter's Instinct
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Dalang's Ally
feats.description: You move your shadow as a master puppeteer, allowing it to dance around your enemies and serve you in combat.

feats.name: Dance of the Jester
feats.description: Through your incredible dance skill, you can embody the character of the Jester, able to take control of the shadows of other players on stage (much to your amusement).

feats.name: Debilitating Breath
feats.description: Your breath causes lasting hindrance to those it harms.

feats.name: Delver
feats.description: Subterranean life taught you to swim through the ground like water. You gain a burrow Speed of 10 feet through loose soil or dirt.

feats.name: Digger
feats.description: You are used to building homes and defenses underground. You gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet.
prerequisites: running animal or climbing animal heritage

feats.name: Dire Form
feats.description: Your hybrid shape is a hulking beast. While in your hybrid shape, you gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge].

feats.name: Disruptive Stare
feats.description: Trigger A creature within 30 feet attempts to Cast a Spell with the concentrate trait.

feats.name: Draconic Might
feats.description: The power of dragons fully suffuses your body. Your draconic resistance becomes equal to your level, and your breath weapon damage increases by an additional 2d6.

feats.name: Draconic Veil
feats.description: Like some dragons, your forebear had the supernatural ability to change their shape to walk among humanoids.

feats.name: Earth Glide
feats.description: You can pass through earth and stone as if swimming. Once per day, you gain a burrow Speed equal to your Speed for 10 minutes. You can pass through stone, dirt, and similar materials but not metal.

feats.name: Eclectic Sword Mastery
feats.description: You instinctively learn how to use a sword with just a few practice swings.

feats.name: Eldritch Calm
feats.description: Your fey heritage has altered your mindset to more resemble the uncanny perspective of the fey.

feats.name: Elemental Wrath
feats.description: Your elemental heritage fully manifests as devastating power. Your Elemental Assault additional damage increases to 2d6, and you can use it at will instead of once per day.

feats.name: Elite Dracomancer
feats.description: Your draconic power equals that of a lesser dragon.

feats.name: Elucidation
feats.description: Trigger You succeed at a saving throw to disbelieve an illusion.

feats.name: Enlarged Chassis
feats.description: You've empowered your core to support a larger body, granting you size and additional reach.

feats.name: Envenomed Edge
feats.description: With a combination of your poison glands and herbal concoctions, you can consistently deliver venomous attacks when you hit an enemy's weak points.

feats.name: Eternal Memories
feats.description: Frequency once per day You have lived longer than most realize, and due to your many lifetimes of practice you remember almost everything from your previous incarnations now.

feats.name: Explosive Expert
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Ferocious Beasts
feats.description: Since ancient times, the mightiest orc beast tamers would draw out the true fighting spirit of their companion beasts by feeding the creatures a draft incorporating the orc's own blood.
prerequisites: animal companion, Pet, or Bonded Animal

feats.name: Ferry Through Waves
feats.description: 2 or 3 Requirements You are swimming and have a free hand.

feats.name: Fey Skin
feats.description: While you are more susceptible to cold iron than most of the Wingless, you also have an incredible resilience and a deeper connection to the healing energies of the First World.

feats.name: Fiendish Strikes
feats.description: Your festering connection to the forces of evil infuses your weapons with debilitating malevolence, tearing down creatures of good with every attack. All your weapon and unarmed Strikes gain the unholy and magical traits.

feats.name: Finest Trick
feats.description: Many fiends—rakshasa rajas and demonic succubi most famously—can take on the forms of others.

feats.name: Flame Jump
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your peri lineage has opened your mind to fire's raw, purging essence.

feats.name: Flames of Vision
feats.description: Access dokkaebi goblin heritage or Tian Xia origin Dokkaebi were among the first goblins to pioneer gazing through flames, spectral or physical, to cast their senses far and wide.

feats.name: Flower Chimera
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin You call on a guardian of the wild to burst forth from the land to aid you.

feats.name: Form a Flock
feats.description: You call nearby wild dragonets to swarm to your side.

feats.name: Form of the Bat
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You can transform into a harmless bat. You gain the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pest Form], except you always transform into a bat.

feats.name: Formation Master
feats.description: You can assemble a formation even with members of ancestries that lack the hobgoblins' military discipline, and you can extend these benefits to your hobgoblin allies.

feats.name: Generation Digger
feats.description: You're so adept at burrowing through the earth that you don't even need tools; in fact, you just might be trusted to lead the latest generation dig. You gain a burrow speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Falchion]{Falchions}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ranseur]{Ranseurs}, @…

feats.name: Germination of Resolve
feats.description: Frequency once per day Vitality floods your trammeled soul, offering you rejuvenation, if not quite rest.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Expertise
feats.description: It's as if you've been training for a thousand years.

feats.name: Gift of the Moon
feats.description: You can share your power with others, but they can't escape the werecreature's curse as easily as you can.

feats.name: Glamour
feats.description: You unlock a new level of fey power and can manipulate the perceptions of others using a font of First World magic.

feats.name: Hag Sight
feats.description: Your eyes carry the terrible sight of your hag mother. You gain darkvision. Once per day, you can cast true seeing as an occult innate spell.

feats.name: Harbinger's Caw
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature within 60 feet is about to attempt an attack roll or skill check. You caw ominously, cursing the creature with misfortune. The target creature must roll the triggering check twice and take the lower result.

feats.name: Heart of Earth
feats.description: The earth parts to allow you passage. You gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet. While burrowing, your tremorsense becomes precise up to 15 feet. When you Burrow, you can choose to leave behind a tunnel of your size or smaller for others to traverse through.

feats.name: Hop Up
feats.description: Trigger You lose the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] condition. Your frog-like agility awakens as soon as you do. You Stand. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

feats.name: Hybrid Form
feats.description: You can take on a powerful hybrid form between humanoid and animal. Once per day, you can cast animal form as a 5th-level primal innate spell, but the form matches your inherent animal.

feats.name: Hydraulic Maneuvers
feats.description: You batter your foes with a torrent of water siphoned from your surroundings.

feats.name: Idol Threat
feats.description: Requirements You're holding something sacred or precious to a creature, such as a relic or personal depiction of their deity or a precious personal memento.

feats.name: Iivlar's Boundary Break
feats.description: You can bend the boundary between planes with the natural skill of an iivlar. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Flicker] as a 4th-rank occult innate spell once per day. When you Sustain the spell, increase the distance you teleport to 15 feet.

feats.name: Imperial Dragon Potion
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can spend 10 minutes to create a variant energy breath potion , which has the kobold trait in addition to its normal traits.

feats.name: Impose Order
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You would critically fail a skill check or suffer an effect with the misfortune trait.

feats.name: Impossible Gossip
feats.description: You can speak to inanimate objects, finding a magical spark within them similar to the one that animated you.

feats.name: Improved Elemental Bulwark
feats.description: You gain resistance 10 from Elemental Bulwark instead of 5.

feats.name: Improved Signature Weapon
feats.description: Your signature weapon takes on the properties of mystical materials renowned for defeating undead, spirits, and other such creatures. Your signature weapon is treated as dawnsilver, duskwood, and peachwood for the purposes of overcoming resistance.

feats.name: Incredible Ferocity
feats.description: Given time to rest, you can recover from ferocity more quickly. You can use Orc Ferocity without increasing your wounded condition once per hour instead of once per day.

feats.name: Incredible Luck (Halfling)
feats.description: Even other halflings consider you to be particularly lucky.

feats.name: Incredible Sprint
feats.description: You push yourself, unleashing a burst of sudden speed. You Stride three times.

feats.name: Inspirit Hazard
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Disable a Device]{Disable} a hazard.

feats.name: Instinctive Obfuscation
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You are attacked by a foe, but they haven't rolled yet.
prerequisites: at least one arcane or occult innate spell gained from a gnome heritage or gnome ancestry feat

feats.name: Invisible Trickster
feats.description: You have learned how to become invisible and remain so. You can cast 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility] as a primal innate spell once per hour.

feats.name: Irriseni Ice-Witch
feats.description: You can trace your direct descent from one of the Queens of Irrisen and thus from Baba Yaga herself.

feats.name: Iruxi Spirit Strike
feats.description: Your iruxi unarmed attacks channel the spiritual energy of your ancestors. Any unarmed attacks you acquire from the lizardfolk ancestry, lizardfolk heritages, or lizardfolk ancestry feats gain the effects of a ghost touch property rune.

feats.name: Jinx Glutton
feats.description: You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Eat Fortune] once per hour, rather than once per day.

feats.name: Jotun's Restoration
feats.description: You've mastered how to tap into your restorative powers at a higher frequency. You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Caretaker's Restoration] once per hour instead of once per day.

feats.name: Kaiju's Footfalls
feats.description: You channel the might and mass of a kaiju.

feats.name: Kashrishi Revivification
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

feats.name: Kijimuna Whistle
feats.description: Access kijimuna gnome heritage or Tian Xia origin Your connection to nature—and trees, in particular—has become so strong that you can summon the plants you befriended in the forests of your youth.
prerequisites: kijimuna gnome heritage or at least one primal innate spell from a gnome heritage or feat

feats.name: Killing Stone
feats.description: Your star orb hides a deadly miasma. You can cast 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Toxic Cloud] as a divine innate spell once per day. The spell's normal components are replaced with a focus component (your star orb) and a somatic component to a…

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Expertise
feats.description: Your tails show your magical mastery. During your daily preparations, choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Confusion], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Death Ward], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Scene]. You can Cast this Spell…

feats.name: Larger than Life
feats.description: When you Change Shape, you can assume the form of a creature that's Large or Huge in size. In addition to your increased space, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks.

feats.name: Lifeblood's Call
feats.description: The impulse to survive and continue fighting resonates deep within you.

feats.name: Light-Bending Jewel
feats.description: Your ability to walk unseen through the world has given you the new moon's blessing.

feats.name: Living Metal
feats.description: Your metallic body reaches its full potential. You gain a +1 status bonus to AC permanently. Your resistance from Metal Skin increases to your full level.

feats.name: Look but Don't Touch
feats.description: Frequency once per day Many flowers are beautiful to look upon but deadly to touch—and you're one of them.

feats.name: Luring Chomp
feats.description: Through your wiles, charm, or a little bit of magic, you lure in a foe for a closer look—and a quick bite! Choose a creature within 30 feet.

feats.name: Magitaxis
feats.description: Trigger A creature you could reach with a Stride action Casts a Spell from the tradition matching your magiphage ability.

feats.name: Majestic Presence
feats.description: By taking an impressive stance, the full force of your personality cows lesser beings.

feats.name: Malleable Form
feats.description: Requirements You're polymorphed by a spell that has multiple choices of battle form.
prerequisites: ability to cast at least one polymorph spell

feats.name: March the Mines
feats.description: You march through the earth and lead an ally along.

feats.name: Mask of Fear
feats.description: Trigger You start your turn with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] condition.

feats.name: Memory of Mastery
feats.description: Flashes of past selves surface in an instant, especially when you're under duress. You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Memory of Skill] once per hour instead of once per day.

feats.name: Metal-veined Strikes
feats.description: Metallic veins grow throughout your body, giving your unarmed attacks a metallic sheen. Choose either cold iron or silver. Your unarmed attacks are treated as the chosen type of metal.

feats.name: Miraculous Medic
feats.description: Your ability to heal others is miraculous enough to bring people back from near-death. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Breath of Life] as an innate primal spell.

feats.name: Mischievous Tail
feats.description: Your tail can bedevil your foes. You can Disarm and Trip creatures with your tail, even if you don't have a free hand. All restrictions of Skillful Tail otherwise continue to apply. If you have Smashing Tail, your tail unarmed attack gains the disarm and trip…

feats.name: Mist Strider
feats.description: You condense the moisture in the air, solidifying it so it can hold your weight.

feats.name: Monkey Spirits
feats.description: Vanaras generally consider the spirits of departed monkeys to be less informative or interesting than their own ancestors traveling the cycles of existence, yet these monkey spirits can prove useful when the situation is dire.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Expertise
feats.description: Your magical skill rivals that of accomplished naga spellcasters.

feats.name: None Shall Know
feats.description: Even magical means have a hard time prying information from you.

feats.name: One with Earth
feats.description: You've learned to harness your connection to the earth to travel through it. You gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: One with the Wild
feats.description: You naturally blend in with the wilderness, becoming camouflaged.

feats.name: Oni Rampage
feats.description: Trigger You're reduced to less than half your maximum Hit Points by a creature within your reach. Nothing invigorates you more than your own freshly spilled blood. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Haste] for 1 minute.

feats.name: Oni Transformation
feats.description: You can take on a fearsome oni form. Once per day, you can cast enlarge on yourself as a 4th-level occult innate spell. While enlarged this way, you also gain a +2 status bonus to Intimidation checks.

feats.name: Palm-Leaf Silhouette
feats.description: You can make yourself as flat as a paper doll or shadow.

feats.name: Perfect Copy
feats.description: You can create a perfect duplicate of yourself. Once per day, you can cast mislead as a 6th-level occult innate spell.

feats.name: Phantom Charm
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You attempt a check that would be subject to a misfortune effect.

feats.name: Pit of Snakes
feats.description: Mundane serpents obey your summons. You call forth a writhing mass of snakes, raising your hands to cause the snakes to emerge from the ground in a @Template[burst|distance:20] within 120 feet. The snakes appear on all squares of the ground in the area and re…

feats.name: Planar Resistance
feats.description: Your planar connection suffuses every part of your being. The resistance from Celestial Resistance increases to your full level. You gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against divine spells.

feats.name: Planar Sidestep
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature hits you with a melee Strike.

feats.name: Plane Hop
feats.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes The spaces between planes are obvious to you, and you can use them to move in unexpected ways. You instantly teleport to any point you could reach with your Speed.

feats.name: Ponpoko-Pon!
feats.description: Whether it's because you play especially vigorously or are simply off-key, the music of your belly drum can physically wound your foes.

feats.name: Primal Rampage
feats.description: You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Unfettered Movement] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mountain Resilience] as 4th-rank primal innate spells that you can cast once per day.

feats.name: Protean Anatomy
feats.description: Your internal anatomy shifts constantly, making you hard to kill. You gain resistance to precision damage equal to half your level. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that require a living body to function (such as disease and poison).

feats.name: Pummeling Whirlpool
feats.description: Frequency once per day You draw water from the environs, swirling it into a rough torrent around you to punish your foes.

feats.name: Purge Sins
feats.description: Frequency once per day You call on your celestial forebears to rid your body of all toxins and impurities.

feats.name: Radiant Burst
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your skin glows with intensity.

feats.name: Rapid Pheromone Recovery
feats.description: Your supply of pheromones replenish very quickly. You can Emit Defensive Odor once per hour, rather than once per day.

feats.name: Reanimating Spark
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

feats.name: Redirect Attention
feats.description: Through your strong connection with your progenitor, you're able to redirect those attempting to spy on you.

feats.name: Rehydration
feats.description: Frequency once per day You surround your body with a thin layer of water drawn from the moisture in the air.

feats.name: Reimagine
feats.description: You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dreaming Potential] as an innate occult spell. You can cast this spell targeting yourself as your last activity before falling asleep to receive its normal benefits and effects.

feats.name: Rejuvenating Embrace
feats.description: You rejuvenate your spirit by taking your rest where Mother Earth embraces Father Moon.

feats.name: Resist Ruin
feats.description: Your duskwalker heritage allows you to extend protection against void energy. You gain resistance 5 to void, and once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.False Vitality] as a 5th-rank divine innate spell.

feats.name: Resplendent Spellhorn
feats.description: Your magic continues to flourish. Choose one common 3rd-rank arcane spell and one common 4th-rank arcane spell. You can cast each of these spells once per day as arcane innate spells.

feats.name: Revivification Protocol
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You have the dying condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

feats.name: Scrutinizing Gaze
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Sea Witch
feats.description: You've studied the waves, and they obey your will as extensions of your own fin. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Aqueous Orb] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Control Water] as 5th-rank primal innate spells, each once per day.

feats.name: Secret Eyes
feats.description: You can call forth an invisible eye to let you peek on secrets. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Scouting Eye] as an innate occult spell.

feats.name: See the Unseen
feats.description: You notice things that others can't see at all.

feats.name: Shadow Pact
feats.description: Thousands of years ago, your ancestors made a pact with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.Zon-Kuthon].

feats.name: Shadow's Assault
feats.description: Your shadow assaults your foes. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Shadow Blast] as a 5th-rank occult innate spell once per day. At 17th level, your shadow blast is heightened to 6th level.

feats.name: Shaitan Skin
feats.description: When in danger, you can harden the stone in your skin into armor, much like a shaitan. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mountain Resilience] on yourself only, 3 times per day as a 4th-rank arcane innate spell.

feats.name: Sharpened Senses
feats.description: Frequency once per round Your senses have become so sharp that you notice changes subconsciously. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Seek]. If you use one of your senses from Natural Senses, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the check.

feats.name: Sheltering Jewel
feats.description: Your head gem has accessed the power of the full moon through your determination to heal and protect your loved ones.

feats.name: Shift the Little Ones
feats.description: With your large size, you need to be careful around your smaller friends.

feats.name: Shinstabber
feats.description: As long as you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as an ally of any size. Only two creatures total can share the same space when using this ability or a similar one.

feats.name: Shory Aerialist
feats.description: Unique in Golarion's history, the Shory people developed fighting styles dedicated to combat in the air. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight and a +5-foot status bonus to your fly Speed whenever you are flying via magic.
prerequisites: Shory Aeromancer or ability to cast fly

feats.name: Skeletal Transformation
feats.description: You rearrange your bones into a bestial shape.

feats.name: Skeleton Commander
feats.description: You gain the ability to summon your own skeletal minions.

feats.name: Skirt the Light
feats.description: You can travel the border between the Material and Shadow Planes and even bring others along. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Umbral Journey] as an occult innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Skittering Sneak
feats.description: You squish, slink, and skitter from cover to cover with great speed and stealth. You can move up to your full Speed when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak].

feats.name: Slay Giants Unseen
feats.description: In the darkness, your attacks can bring any red-faced giant to their knees.

feats.name: Slip Sideways
feats.description: Like many fiends, you have the supernatural ability to teleport yourself to safety. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Translocate] as a 5th-rank divine innate spell.
prerequisites: Grimspawn, Pitborn, or Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends or the Maelstrom

feats.name: Smoothing Stomp
feats.description: You stomp and unleash a wave of the magic of creation in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] that transforms non-magical difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain into normal terrain.

feats.name: Spell Devourer
feats.description: You don't just resist magic; you devour it.

feats.name: Spew Tentacles
feats.description: You can open your mouth to an immense size and spew forth an impossibly large field of tentacles.

feats.name: Spiritual Headhunter
feats.description: Your spirit coffin can temporarily detain the spirits of those you kill, allowing you to ask them one last question before they pass on.

feats.name: Spiteful Rake
feats.description: Requirements You have both hands free. Your instincts sing of spite and malice, and you've learned a devastating trick: go for the eyes. You make a claw Strike. If you hit and deal damage, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1…

feats.name: Splendid Illusion
feats.description: You cover your surroundings in outlandish fantasy. You can cast 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Scene] as a primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Squirm Free
feats.description: Trigger A creature grabs, immobilizes, or restrains you. You're used to slipping out of a bigger creature's grasp or escaping a child's overly enthusiastic hug. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape].

feats.name: Steadfast Ally
feats.description: Your presence alone is enough to provide your allies with emotional support. You can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Aid] reaction to grant a bonus to another creature's Will saving throw even when you haven't prepared to help.

feats.name: Storm Wings
feats.description: Wings of wind carry you aloft. You gain a permanent fly Speed equal to your Speed.

feats.name: Stronger Debilitating Venom
feats.description: Add one of the following to the debilitations from which you can choose when you Envenom.

feats.name: Stubborn Persistence
feats.description: Humans are renowned for their ability to persist through the most grueling of trials. When you gain the dying condition, you can choose to gain the doomed 1 condition instead. If you already have the doomed condition, your doomed condition increases by 1 instead.

feats.name: Suli Amir
feats.description: You have power connected to the powerful jann amirs.

feats.name: Summon Air Elemental
feats.description: You have a connection to the Inner Spheres, allowing you to summon an elemental ally. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Elemental] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell, but the elemental summoned must be an air elemental.

feats.name: Summon Earth Elemental
feats.description: You have a connection to the Inner Sphere, allowing you to summon an elemental ally. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Elemental] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell, but the elemental summoned must be an earth elemental.

feats.name: Summon Fire Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Elemental] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell, but the elemental summoned must be a fire elemental.

feats.name: Summon Metal Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Elemental] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell, but the elemental summoned must be a metal elemental.

feats.name: Summon Nephilim Kin
feats.description: You have a connection to the Outer Planes, allowing you to summon a divine ally.

feats.name: Summon Water Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Elemental] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell, but the elemental summoned must be a water elemental.

feats.name: Summon Wood Elemental
feats.description: Your connection to the Plane of Wood allows you to summon elemental allies. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Elemental] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell, but the elemental must be a wood elemental.

feats.name: Swift Eel Mount
feats.description: Your rapport with your eel lets you guide it to avoid dangers as it swims. While you're mounted on an eel, that eel ignores difficult terrain while Swimming and gets a +2 circumstance bonus to all defenses against reactions triggered by its movement.

feats.name: Synchronous Slither
feats.description: Trigger An ally within your reach leaves a square during a move action they're using and ends their movement adjacent to an enemy.

feats.name: Telluric Power
feats.description: You channel strength from the earth beneath your feet to pummel your enemies.

feats.name: Tempest Gaze
feats.description: Your third eye grows stronger and more powerful.

feats.name: Threatening Pursuit
feats.description: Requirements You are not observed by any enemies within 60 feet.

feats.name: Thunder God's Fan
feats.description: Your fan unleashes the fury of the storm. You can use the Wave Fan activation one additional time per day. Add a 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Lightning Bolt] spell to the spells contained within your fan.

feats.name: Tidal Surge
feats.description: You can unleash the full power of the tides. Once per day, you can cast hydraulic torrent as a 6th-level primal innate spell.

feats.name: Toppling Dance
feats.description: While sharing a creature's space using Dance Underfoot, your melee weapons and unarmed attacks gain the trip trait, but only against the creature whose space you share.

feats.name: Trample (Centaur)
feats.description: You've trained to stampede right over smaller foes without causing yourself any harm.

feats.name: Translucent Skin
feats.description: Your body is translucent while underwater. Whenever you are fully submerged in water, you can Hide from other creatures even if you don't have cover against them and aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] from them.

feats.name: Treehealer
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can undo the effect of demonic corruption in plants.

feats.name: Truespeech
feats.description: It is paramount that you are understood and you understand others; language need not impede your message.

feats.name: Tumbling Diversion
feats.description: Attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Tumble Through] an opponent's space.

feats.name: Unbound Freedom
feats.description: Your future is no other person's to control, and the cycles of your fate sometimes step in to protect you when that control would be taken from you.

feats.name: Unbreakable-er Goblin
feats.description: As hard as most unbreakable goblins are to break, you are that much harder to break.

feats.name: Unconventional Expertise
feats.description: You've continued to advance your powers using your unconventional weapon.
prerequisites: trained in the weapon you chose for Unconventional Weaponry

feats.name: Unfettered Growth
feats.description: By tapping into the limitless power of the Plane of Wood, you can experience sudden, dramatic growth for a short time.
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait

feats.name: Universal Longevity
feats.description: You've perfected your ability to keep up with all the skills you've learned over your long life, so you're almost never truly untrained at a skill. You become trained in all skills in which you are untrained.

feats.name: Unnerving Terror
feats.description: Frequency once per day Requirements You're in yaoguai form.

feats.name: Unrivaled Builder
feats.description: Building things is like solving a puzzle, and you know how to use anything at your disposal to get the job done.

feats.name: Vampiric Exsanguination
feats.description: You tap into the full power of your vampiric heritage. Once per day, you can cast vampiric exsanguination as a 6th-level occult innate spell.

feats.name: Vanara Battle Clarity
feats.description: Your focus in combat is practically unshakable.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Thanks to numerous joyous practice exercises, you've become an expert in vanara weapons.

feats.name: Venom Purge
feats.description: Frequency once per day You produce a specialized venom that burns out other toxins and impurities in your body.

feats.name: Verdant Growth
feats.description: Your body channels plant growth. Once per day, you can cast tree stride as a primal innate spell.

feats.name: Very, Very Sneaky
feats.description: You can move up to your Speed when you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak] action, and you no longer need to have cover or greater cover or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hid…

feats.name: Vicious Snares
feats.description: You deal an additional 1d6 precision damage with damage snares you craft. This increases to 2d6 additional precision damage if you're legendary in Crafting.

feats.name: Violent Vines
feats.description: When angered, you can imbue nearby vines with your wrath, provoking them into a murderous rampage. Once per hour, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Murderous Vine] as a primal innate spell.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Extensive training has granted you an elegant control in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

feats.name: Wandering Heart
feats.description: While all elves adapt to their environments over time, you have traveled so widely and become attuned to so many environs that your body now changes more rapidly than other elves.
prerequisites: arctic elf, cavern elf, desert elf, woodland elf, or any other elf heritage based on adapting to an environment

feats.name: War Conditioning
feats.description: You have extensive training in remote environments, allowing you to move through these areas easily. When you gain this feat, you can choose to gain either a climb Speed of 20 feet or a swim Speed of 20 feet.

feats.name: Warren Digger
feats.description: You've learned to put your sturdy claws to work digging through the earth. You gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Water to Water
feats.description: You allow your body to collapse into water, then reconstitute your corporeal form elsewhere.

feats.name: We March On
feats.description: You make sure that your allies push themselves while traveling. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Caravan Leader] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Pick up the Pace] general feats, even if you don't meet the prerequisites.

feats.name: Webslinger
feats.description: Frequency once per 10 minutes Your natural ability to create silken webs blends with your magical powers, allowing you to create impossibly large webs with great frequency.

feats.name: Wild-Haired Fury
feats.description: Your broken bones jut at odd angles, yet this pain only adds to your anger and prowess.

feats.name: Wooden Mantle
feats.description: Your connection to the magic of the Plane of Wood allows you to call upon the power of plants and trees to protect yourself. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mantle of the Unwavering Heart] as a 5th-rank primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Along the Deep River
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin, or you're a follower of Sangpotshi.

feats.name: Animal Swiftness
feats.description: You move like an animal. Your Speed increases by 5 feet. In addition, you gain one of the following Speeds available to your inherent animal: climb, fly, or swim. You gain this Speed only while in your hybrid shape. The new movement is as fast as your standar…

feats.name: Ascendant Blood
feats.description: Twice per week, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Interplanar Teleport] as an innate spell of the tradition corresponding to your draconic exemplar.
prerequisites: draconic exemplar associated with a specific plane (such as a diabolic dragon or empyreal dragon)

feats.name: Awakened Stride
feats.description: You blend your instinct and intellect to move so fast you seem to be a blur. When you use Wild Stride, you can Stride three times, and you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] during the movement.

feats.name: Axial Recall
feats.description: You have reconfigured the magical resonance of your core to attune to the planar energies of Axis, enabling instantaneous travel to that plane.

feats.name: Azaersi's Roads
feats.description: Azaersi has granted you limited access to the Stone Roads, attuning you to the tiniest sliver of the Onyx Key.

feats.name: Begin Stampede
feats.description: The sight of you charging forward into battle emboldens your allies to follow.

feats.name: Bend Space
feats.description: Not even space itself is a match for the unleashed power of your mind.

feats.name: Benefactor's Majesty
feats.description: Frequency once per day You tap into the grandeur of your warren's benefactor.

feats.name: Bone Swarm
feats.description: Frequency once per day You scatter your body and transform into a whirling storm of bones for up to 1 minute or until you spend a single action to return to your normal shape.

feats.name: Breath of Calamity
feats.description: Your roar shakes the earth and splits the heavens.

feats.name: Call the Swarm
feats.description: Frequency once per day You give a shrill whistle and point, and a massive swarm of rats pours forth from the surrounding terrain to fill a @Template[burst|distance:30] within 120 feet.

feats.name: Cantorian Restoration
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A living creature within 60 feet would die.

feats.name: Ceremony of Sun's Gift
feats.description: Your connection to the sun has become an unbreakable bond.

feats.name: Channel the Godmind
feats.description: Frequency once per day You tap into the collective consciousness of the Godmind, the governing entity of axiomite society, to rapidly parse near-infinite variables to read your surroundings.

feats.name: Cleansing Light
feats.description: Frequency once per day A burst of light from your horn cleanses your allies of ailments and sends your foes reeling.

feats.name: Convocation of Earth and Moon
feats.description: Frequency once per day You call upon Mother Earth and Father Moon to fill you with light.

feats.name: Coral Lifeline
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your coral symbiotes have grown into your bloodstream and are now curled around your heart.

feats.name: Core Cannon
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your body transforms into a powerful magical cannon.

feats.name: Crone's Cruelty
feats.description: Filled with rancor and hate, you rend the minds of those who displease you. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Warp Mind] once per day as an occult innate spell.

feats.name: Dazzling Dragonet Disappearance
feats.description: Trigger An adjacent enemy hits you with an attack.

feats.name: Demon Slayer
feats.description: Frequency once per day You can deliver a melee blow to a demon that creates an explosion of holy light to try to finish the demon off.

feats.name: Dissolution's Sovereignty
feats.description: With discipline born from a lifetime in darkness, you convince the shadow of an enemy to fight by your side.

feats.name: Divine Declaration
feats.description: You can call forth a holy or unholy word from the realms beyond to punish your foes. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Divine Decree] as a 7th-rank divine innate spell.

feats.name: Dominion Aura
feats.description: Frequency once per day For a short time, you fully manifest the expectations of the god destroyer within you.

feats.name: Doom of Sailors
feats.description: Frequency once per day Sailors know that the sight of an angry merfolk might well mean that they never see the shore again.

feats.name: Dragonet Immunities
feats.description: You will not fall asleep unless you choose to allow it, nor will you sit still.

feats.name: Elude Trouble
feats.description: Trigger A creature missed you with a melee attack. Stride up to your Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions from the creature that missed you.

feats.name: Eternal Wings (Nephilim)
feats.description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Divine Wings] at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Eternal Wings (Sylph)
feats.description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Wings of Air] at all times rather than just once per day for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Favor of Heaven
feats.description: You're one of Hei Feng's chosen people and have the authority of the Celestial Court on your side.

feats.name: Fearsome Form
feats.description: A fearsome illusion covers you, evoking the terror of the most dangerous animals.

feats.name: Fey Transcendence
feats.description: You become a powerful fey creature, gaining strengths tied to the First World but also some of the weakness against which all fey must contend.

feats.name: Final Form
feats.description: Frequency once per day You embrace your monstrous blood and make it your own, screaming out to the heavens and hells alike in rage, pain, and defiance.

feats.name: First to Strike, First to Fall
feats.description: Whenever you successfully Strike a creature that has not acted in the first round of combat, that creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Flourish and Ruin
feats.description: You can call upon the vital essence of your spirit to restore life to your allies and call forth vines to ensnare and bludgeon your foes.

feats.name: Forge-Blessed Shot
feats.description: Access You are from Dongun Hold or Alkenstar.

feats.name: Form of the Beloved Mother
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin or follower of Nalinivati You channel the blessings of Nalinivati to transform into a manifestation of her will.

feats.name: Form of the Dragon
feats.description: You can briefly transform into a paragon of your draconic ancestry.

feats.name: Fossil Rider
feats.description: Using your ancestors' bones, you manifest their spirits around you in a fossilized form.

feats.name: Fountain of Secrets
feats.description: Frequency once per round You constantly remember details about the world.

feats.name: Fox Possession
feats.description: You can project a spiritual form to possess another.

feats.name: Gentle Death and Rebirth
feats.description: You were once born from the energies of the land and nature, and by their power, you can return to life again.

feats.name: Ghoran's Wrath
feats.description: You have such a strong connection to the natural world that you can inspire it to attack at those who threaten you. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Nature's Reprisal] once per hour as a primal innate spell.

feats.name: Great Tengu Form
feats.description: You take on the imposing form of a large, winged spirit.

feats.name: Greater Augmentation
feats.description: You've greatly improved your abilities and your core can support further augmentations.

feats.name: Greater Enhance Venom
feats.description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Envenom] to greater vishkanyan venom.

feats.name: Greater than the Sum
feats.description: You call upon the familial bonds you share with your allies and other ratfolk to become an overwhelming force in battle. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge] as a 6th-rank primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Heroic Presence
feats.description: The blood of heroes courses through your veins, and you inspire your allies to dig deep and find a new level of resolve. All allies within 30 feet gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 minute.

feats.name: Homeward Bound
feats.description: Frequency twice per week The connection between you and the First World resonates within your body stronger than it does for most gnomes, allowing you to cross the threshold between the Universe and the First World.

feats.name: Hurricane Swing
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You critically hit a foe with a Strike with a slashing weapon.

feats.name: Impaling Bone
feats.description: Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Impaling Spike] as a 7th-rank innate occult spell, except the spike is made of bone instead of cold iron.

feats.name: Into the Labyrinth
feats.description: Calling on your connection to minotaurs of myth, you shunt an enemy into a complex maze full of puzzles of your own devising.

feats.name: Irresistible Bloom
feats.description: Frequency once per day You bloom, sprouting flowers and releasing a pleasant smell, becoming irresistible.
prerequisites: ardande trait, plant trait, or wood trait

feats.name: Jotun's Heart
feats.description: You have unlocked the power of a true giant within you.

feats.name: Jotun's Transposition
feats.description: You've learned to fully move across planes, beginning with the Ethereal Plane.

feats.name: Kishin Rage
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your eyes glow a deep red and your body courses with adrenaline as you obtain a fraction of the power of the kishin oni.

feats.name: Kraken's Call
feats.description: Frequency once per day You call forth the sleeping krakens of the deep to crush your enemies.

feats.name: Landscape Form
feats.description: While walking down the road on a moonlit night, one might be puzzled to find a shop or hill that wasn't there before.

feats.name: Legendary Laugh
feats.description: Your laugher echoes in the minds of your enemies.

feats.name: Legendary Monster
feats.description: Your yaoguai form has reached its pinnacle, allowing you to assume (or perhaps, return to) the form of a monster of legend.

feats.name: Lingering Breath
feats.description: Your draconic breath destroys the surrounding environment and leaves your enemies in pain.

feats.name: Magic Rider
feats.description: Your people used powerful magic to travel between distant worlds in the distant past, and the remnants of that magic make such transportation easier for you. When you are the target of a teleportation spell that allows you to use your reaction to resist it, you can choose to assist the spell instead, increasing the distance you teleport by up to 100 miles.

feats.name: Merge with the Source
feats.description: You're among the most powerful of Speakers and can adopt the form of the spirits you entreat with.
prerequisites: budding speaker centaur heritage or Speaker in Training

feats.name: Metallic Skin
feats.description: Frequency once per day Duration 1 minute You fortify your natural resistances with elemental metal, covering your skin with thick metal.

feats.name: Mooneater
feats.description: You call on the spirit of the dragon that devoured the moon to temporarily swallow a celestial body and blind onlookers with its visage.

feats.name: Moray Ambush
feats.description: Trigger You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] and a creature who hasn't detected you passes within 20 feet of you.

feats.name: Necromantic Heir
feats.description: Your affinity for void energy spills outward and grants you a refilling well of necromantic essence. Once per hour, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Harm] as a 6th-rank divine innate spell.

feats.name: Nodal Regeneration
feats.description: Your body processes magic so effectively that you can induce true regeneration, replacing limbs and restoring organs.

feats.name: Offensive Odor
feats.description: You've mastered your defensive pheromones and have nearly complete control over them.

feats.name: Olethros's Decree
feats.description: Frequency once per day You have a connection to olethroses, the enigmatic psychopomps who successfully swayed the yamaraj to permit the creation of the first duskwalkers.

feats.name: Pandemonium Eruption
feats.description: Frequency once per day You unleash the pent-up chaos within you, becoming a nexus of unbridled destruction that wreaks unfettered havoc on everyone in your vicinity.

feats.name: Perfected Gamtu
feats.description: Your hat embodies the illusory grandeur of a master dokkaebi.

feats.name: Pierce the Light
feats.description: You tear the veil between the Universe and its shadow.

feats.name: Planar Traveler
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger Your turn begins.

feats.name: Potent Nectar
feats.description: Your nectar becomes particularly dangerous.

feats.name: Prismatic Scales
feats.description: You can cause your scales to glow with scintillating, many-hued colors, protecting you from energy while dazzling foes.

feats.name: Radiate Glory
feats.description: Your inherent glory radiates into the world with all the divine power of the celestial planes for 1 minute.

feats.name: Rallying Cry
feats.description: Frequency once per day You call out to your allies and push them to give their all in combat.

feats.name: Rampaging Ferocity
feats.description: Trigger You use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Orc Ferocity]. You lash out viciously even as you fend off death. Make a single melee Strike. If this Strike brings a foe to 0 Hit Points, this activation of Orc Ferocity doesn't count against its frequency.

feats.name: Rampaging Form
feats.description: Once per day, when you Change Shape into a fox, you can instead gain the effects of both the canine form of 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Animal Form] and 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fiery Body] for 1 minute or until you sh…
prerequisites: Change Shape with a fox alternate form

feats.name: Reckless Abandon
feats.description: Frequency once per day Despite a lifetime filled with questionable decisions, you've managed to survive, as though you have uncanny luck that lets you avoid the consequences of your own actions.

feats.name: Reflect Foe
feats.description: You create a copy of a foe by calling them forth from a nearby reflection, clonally growing them in an instant from one of your hairs or otherwise creating them in a way that matches your own nature as a reflection.

feats.name: Regrowth
feats.description: Your command over your vital essence allows you or an ally to recover from grievous wounds. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Regenerate] as a 7th-rank primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Reliable Luck
feats.description: You survive danger with surprising regularity. You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Cat's Luck] once per hour, rather than once per day.

feats.name: Restitch
feats.description: You've learned how to sew even the most terrible tears and wounds together. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Regenerate] as a 7th-rank arcane innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Return to the Seed
feats.description: Once per month, when you die, you can instead choose to fade away.

feats.name: Scion Transformation
feats.description: You go into hibernation for twenty-four hours and perform a ritual dedicated to your ancestors, undergoing a one-time metamorphosis.

feats.name: Sever the Dreaming Shadow
feats.description: As you whisper to your pusaka, it attempts to cut away an enemy's shadow, leaving them in an eternal sleep.

feats.name: Shadow Self
feats.description: Frequency once per hour Trigger You successfully use Stealth to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide] and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] from all your current foes, or use Stealth to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Snea…

feats.name: Soaring Poppet
feats.description: Your construction has flaps of cloth or wicker that can keep you aloft. You gain a fly Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Starshot Arrow
feats.description: The greatest centaurs need not wait until their stories are over to touch the stars in the sky.

feats.name: Start the Festival!
feats.description: No distance can stop tanuki from making their way to a good party.

feats.name: Stone Form
feats.description: You can transform your body into a pure primal manifestation of earth, an elemental. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Elemental Form] as a 7th-rank primal innate spell, but you can only choose the earth elemental form.

feats.name: Stonegate
feats.description: Earthen barriers no longer impede your progress.

feats.name: Stonewall
feats.description: Trigger An enemy or hazard's effect hits you or you fail a Fortitude save against one.

feats.name: Storm Form
feats.description: You can transform into an elemental. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Elemental Form] as a 7th-rank primal innate spell, but you can only choose the air elemental form.

feats.name: Stormy Heart
feats.description: The elemental power in your blood is a raging storm. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Invoke the Elements] with a frequency of once per 10 minutes, rather than once per day.

feats.name: Strength of Eight Legions
feats.description: You meditate for 24 hours in a one-time ceremony within a forest or cave; after your seclusion, your frame and limbs swell with warlike might to enact your vows.

feats.name: Symphony of Blood
feats.description: You call forth the blood of your foes to grant you vigor. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Vampiric Exsanguination] as a 7th-rank divine innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Ten Lives
feats.description: When your character would die, you can attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17].

feats.name: The Cycle Continues
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points and would gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dying] condition or would otherwise die.

feats.name: This Too Shall Pass
feats.description: Mortal worries are such simple matters to you that you leave them behind almost as quickly as you experience them. You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.All This Will Happen Again] once per hour, rather than once per day.
prerequisites: And Will Do So Once More

feats.name: Tidal Shield
feats.description: Frequency once per day You conjure the force of the tides to gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Trample (Sarangay)
feats.description: You know how to leverage your size and momentum when using your horns attack, and can use your movement speed to overrun your foes.

feats.name: Transcend the Azimuth
feats.description: As the earth drinks the light of sun and moon, so does your steady vow imbibe superlunary forces, ready to be unleashed with a moment's mantra.

feats.name: Trickster Tengu
feats.description: You can transform yourself or the bodies of others to express your displeasure.

feats.name: True Gaze
feats.description: Frequency once per hour When you focus your eyes carefully, your gaze can pierce through all obfuscations, even magical ones.

feats.name: True Senses
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your senses are so sharp they pierce through all illusions.

feats.name: Twist Healing
feats.description: Your connection to both life and undeath lets you twist the healing power of magic items to suit your own needs and aims.
prerequisites: ability to cast heal and harm

feats.name: Unbound Leaper
feats.description: Your jumping prowess is unmatched. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Leap] up to 30 feet in any direction without touching the ground and without requiring an Athletics check; when doing so, you must land on a space of solid ground within 30 feet…

feats.name: Underwater Volcano
feats.description: You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Volcanic Eruption] as a 7th-rank primal innate spell once per day, except that you can only evoke the volcano on the floor of a body of water, and the effects that normally happen to flying creatures happen t…

feats.name: Unfettering Prankster
feats.description: You can uplift all around you with your pranks, causing you and your allies to receive divine guidance in all your movements to effortlessly avoid environmental hindrances.

feats.name: Unlimited Pluripotency
feats.description: Within all surkis is the capacity to be whatever they need to be, and you can tap into that capacity even now.

feats.name: Vicious Venom
feats.description: The venom you produce is exceptionally potent and difficult to overcome. Your vishkanyan venom gains the virulent trait, requiring two consecutive saves to reduce the venom's stage by 1. A critical success reduces your venom's stage by only 1 instead of by 2.

feats.name: Wood Ward
feats.description: Trigger A creature targets you with an attack.

feats.name: Wyrmling Flight
feats.description: Your draconic wings have grown large and strong enough for flight. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed, using your wings to stay aloft.

feats.name: Yamaraj's Grandeur
feats.description: Frequency once per day You have been granted a sliver of the power of the yamaraj, the magistrates of the dead who agreed to allow duskwalkers to exist at all.

feats.name: Adopted Ancestry
feats.description: You were raised with or have deeply studied another ancestry. Choose an ancestry other than your own. You can select ancestry feats from that ancestry.

feats.name: Armor Proficiency
feats.description: You become trained in light armor. If you were already trained, you become trained in medium armor. If you were already trained in medium, you become trained in heavy armor.

feats.name: Breath Control
feats.description: You can hold your breath for 25 times as long as usual. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against inhaled threats (gases, vapors, etc.).

feats.name: Canny Acumen
feats.description: Your avoidance or observation is beyond the norm. Choose Fortitude saves, Reflex saves, Will saves, or Perception. You become an expert in that statistic at 17th level.

feats.name: Diehard
feats.description: You die at dying 5 instead of dying 4.

feats.name: Different Worlds
feats.description: Your separate experiences in different societies have evolved into entirely separate lives.
prerequisites: ability to select ancestry feats from multiple ancestries

feats.name: Fast Recovery
feats.description: You regain double the normal number of HP from resting and recover from diseases and poisons more quickly. Reduce your drained, doomed, and sickened values by 2 instead of 1 when you rest.

feats.name: Feather Step
feats.description: You Step into difficult terrain.

feats.name: Fleet
feats.description: You move more quickly on foot. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

feats.name: Incredible Initiative
feats.description: You react more quickly. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls.

feats.name: Pet
feats.description: You have a pet—a Tiny animal of a type you choose, such as a cat, bird, or rodent.

feats.name: Ride
feats.description: When you Command an Animal you're mounted on, the mount can use 2 actions instead of 1. You don't need to attempt Nature checks to Command your mount in combat.

feats.name: Shield Block
feats.description: When you have your shield raised and take damage from a physical attack, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by the shield's hardness. The shield takes the remaining damage.

feats.name: Shield Block
feats.description: Trigger While you have your shield raised, you would take physical damage (bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing) from an attack.

feats.name: Toughness
feats.description: You gain +1 HP per level and reduce the DC of recovery checks by 1.

feats.name: Weapon Proficiency
feats.description: You become trained in all simple weapons or one martial weapon of your choice.

feats.name: Additional Circus Trick
feats.description: Your signature trick can have one additional trait beyond the normal number.
prerequisites: You must have a signature trick

feats.name: Ancestral Paragon
feats.description: You have honed your connection to your ancestry. You gain a 1st-level ancestry feat.

feats.name: Hireling Manager
feats.description: You are able to find and secure better labor than most.

feats.name: Improvised Repair
feats.description: You can hastily patch damaged equipment together, but the temporary fix lacks the full care required for lasting repairs.

feats.name: Keen Follower
feats.description: Your keen observation of your allies has made you better at following their lead.

feats.name: Pick up the Pace
feats.description: You lead by example and can help others push themselves beyond their normal limits. When Hustling in a group during exploration mode, your group can Hustle for as long as the member who could Hustle longest on their own.

feats.name: Prescient Planner
feats.description: You planned ahead. By spending 1 minute rummaging through your gear, you can produce a common piece of adventuring gear worth no more than the listed price, as if you had purchased it beforehand.

feats.name: Robust Health
feats.description: Your physiology responds well to first aid.

feats.name: Skitter
feats.description: You can scoot swiftly across the ground. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Crawl] up to half your Speed.

feats.name: Steel Your Resolve
feats.description: Cost 1 Resolve Point Regain Stamina Points equal to half your maximum. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.Steel Your Resolve]

feats.name: Thorough Search
feats.description: You take your time searching to ensure you find everything.

feats.name: Untrained Improvisation
feats.description: You handle situations you lack training in with greater competence. Your proficiency bonus for untrained skill checks is equal to half your level (minimum 0) instead of +0.

feats.name: Bloodsense
feats.description: You're extraordinarily sensitive to the presence of blood.

feats.name: Expeditious Search
feats.description: You can Search much more quickly. You Search at half your Speed instead of quarter Speed. At master proficiency in Perception, you Search at full Speed.

feats.name: Numb to Death
feats.description: Frequency once per day Your past has left you numb to death's call.
prerequisites: You have died at least once

feats.name: Prescient Consumable
feats.description: You have expanded your planning to include consumable items. When you use Prescient Planner, you can produce a consumable from your backpack up to half your level.

feats.name: Supertaster
feats.description: You have refined your palate and have a discerning sense of taste that can detect abnormalities in the flavor and texture of food and beverages.

feats.name: A Home in Every Port
feats.description: You have a reputation in towns and villages you've visited, and residents are always willing to open their doors to you.

feats.name: Axuma's Awakening
feats.description: Choose two cantrips from the arcane spells list.
prerequisites: Exposure to the Well of Axuma

feats.name: Axuma's Vigor
feats.description: Your vigor grants anyone using Medicine checks to Administer First Aid to you, or use any of the Treat actions on you, a +2 circumstance bonus to their check. During the Long-Term Rest activity, you heal at twice the normal rate.

feats.name: Caravan Leader
feats.description: You know how to get the most effort out of your allies on the road. Your group can Hustle for an additional 20 minutes beyond the length of time that the member who could Hustle longest on their own.

feats.name: Incredible Investiture
feats.description: You have an incredible ability to invest magic items. You can invest up to 12 items instead of the normal 10.

feats.name: Incredible Scout
feats.description: When you scout, you are particularly alert for danger, granting your allies precious moments to prepare to fight.

feats.name: Sanguine Tenacity
feats.description: Your blood carries permanent regenerative properties.

feats.name: True Perception
feats.description: Your perceptive abilities and ability to process sensory information are so far beyond the pale that you notice minute discrepancies in all sorts of illusions and physical transformations.

feats.name: Acrobatic Performer
feats.description: You can use Acrobatics instead of Performance when performing acrobatic feats or stunts.

feats.name: Acupuncturist
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin You've studied the routes by which qi flows through the body.

feats.name: Additional Lore
feats.description: Become trained in a Lore subcategory of your choice. At 3rd, 7th, and 15th levels, you gain an additional skill increase you can apply only to this Lore.

feats.name: Alchemical Crafting
feats.description: You can use the Craft activity to create alchemical items as long as you have the proper formulas.

feats.name: All of the Animal
feats.description: You know how to make the best and most efficient use of a hunted animal's carcass.

feats.name: Arcane Sense
feats.description: You can cast detect magic at will as an arcane innate cantrip.

feats.name: Armor Assist
feats.description: You are practiced at helping yourself and others don heavy gear. When you attempt to don armor, reduce the time by 1 minute (minimum 1 minute). You can also assist an ally donning armor.
prerequisites: Trained in Athletics or Warfare Lore

feats.name: Assurance
feats.description: Choose a skill you are trained in. You can forgo rolling a skill check and instead receive a result of 10 + your proficiency bonus (do not apply other modifiers).
prerequisites: Trained in at least one skill

feats.name: Bargain Hunter
feats.description: You can Earn Income using Diplomacy by searching for deals, gaining a bonus on the check.

feats.name: Battle Medicine
feats.description: Make a Medicine check to heal 2d8 HP. Can only target each creature once per combat.

feats.name: Bon Mot
feats.description: You launch an insightful quip at a foe, distracting them. Choose a creature within 30 feet; it takes a Ã¢â‚¬â€œ2 status penalty to Perception and Will saves unless it succeeds at a Diplomacy check.

feats.name: Cat Fall
feats.description: Treat falls as 10 feet shorter. When you are an expert, 25 feet shorter; master, 50 feet shorter.

feats.name: Charlatan
feats.description: You mimic the abilities of spellcasters by studying their flourishes and words, and can Impersonate a spellcaster with Deception.

feats.name: Charming Liar
feats.description: When you successfully Lie to a creature, you also improve that creature's attitude toward you by one step, as though you had succeeded at a Diplomacy check.

feats.name: Combat Climber
feats.description: You are not off-guard while Climbing and can fight while clinging to a surface with one hand free.

feats.name: Concealing Legerdemain
feats.description: Rather than hide an object somewhere the inspectors won't search, you can keep items moving so they are never where others look.

feats.name: Contract Negotiator
feats.description: Your experience with bargaining and deciding terms as part of Highhelm's guilds helps you make deals in other situations.

feats.name: Courtly Graces
feats.description: You were raised among the nobility or have studied it enough to navigate court life. You can use Society to Make an Impression on a noble.

feats.name: Crafter's Appraisal
feats.description: Your knowledge of construction allows you to discern magical effects on items. You can use Crafting instead of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion to Identify Magic on items.

feats.name: Crystal Healing
feats.description: You know how to stimulate a body's natural healing abilities through the application of resonant crystals.

feats.name: Deceptive Worship
feats.description: You can use Occultism to pass yourself off as a worshipper of a religion other than your own.

feats.name: Dirty Trick
feats.description: You distract a foe by pulling their hat over their eyes, loosening their belt, or other underhanded tactics. Attempt a Thievery check against the target's Reflex DC to apply clumsy 1 or enfeebled 1 until end of their next turn.

feats.name: Dubious Knowledge
feats.description: When you fail (but don't critically fail) a Recall Knowledge check, you learn a mixture of true and erroneous information.
prerequisites: Trained in a skill with the Recall Knowledge action

feats.name: Experienced Professional
feats.description: You treat critical failures on checks to Earn Income as failures instead, and you can use Lore checks to Earn Income more effectively.

feats.name: Experienced Smuggler
feats.description: You often conceal items on your person. When others attempt to find concealed objects on you, they must succeed at a Perception check against your Stealth DC.

feats.name: Experienced Tracker
feats.description: You can Track at full Speed at a Ã¢â‚¬â€œ5 penalty. On difficult terrain, you Track at half Speed without the penalty.

feats.name: Express Rider
feats.description: You can push your mount to cover ground quickly. You gain a +5-foot status bonus to your mount's Speed during overland travel.

feats.name: Eye for Numbers
feats.description: You can quickly estimate the number of items in a group and perform quick mental arithmetic with accuracy.

feats.name: Fascinating Performance
feats.description: When you Perform, you can fascinate one observer. They must attempt a Will save against your Performance DC; on a failure, they are fascinated for 1 round.

feats.name: Forager
feats.description: When you Subsist using Survival, you can provide for yourself and four additional creatures, or eight with a critical success.

feats.name: Forensic Acumen
feats.description: You understand forensic medicine, making you better at examining a body to determine cause of death or injury.

feats.name: Glean Contents
