feats.description: You are adept at quickly scanning loose papers and carefully discerning the contents of sealed letters without breaking the seal.

feats.name: Group Coercion
feats.description: When you Coerce, you can target up to four creatures at once with a single Intimidation check.

feats.name: Group Impression
feats.description: When you Make an Impression, you can target up to four creatures at once with a single Diplomacy check.

feats.name: Hefty Hauler
feats.description: You can carry more. Increase your maximum and encumbered Bulk limits by 2.

feats.name: Hobnobber
feats.description: You are skilled at Gathering Information and can do so in half the normal time. If you're an expert, you can Gather Information in normal exploration time.

feats.name: Impressive Performance
feats.description: You can use Performance instead of Diplomacy to Make an Impression.

feats.name: Improvise Tool
feats.description: You can jury-rig solutions when you don't have proper tools, reducing the penalty for improvised tools.

feats.name: Inoculation
feats.description: You have practice combating plague. When you Treat Disease on a patient, on a success the patient gains a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against that disease for a week.

feats.name: Intimidating Glare
feats.description: You can Demoralize with a mere glare, removing the auditory trait from Demoralize so you don't need to speak.

feats.name: Lengthy Diversion
feats.description: When you successfully Create a Diversion, you remain hidden until the end of your next turn (instead of the end of the current turn).

feats.name: Lie to Me
feats.description: You can use Deception instead of Perception to detect whether someone is Lying to you.

feats.name: Medical Researcher
feats.description: Kassi has taught you not only how to apply medicines with your medical skills but how to craft them as well.

feats.name: Multilingual
feats.description: You learn two new languages. You can select this feat multiple times.

feats.name: Myth Hunter
feats.description: Trigger You successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Recall Knowledge] to identify a creature that has the mythic trait.
prerequisites: trained in Hero-God Lore or Legendary Beast Lore

feats.name: Natural Medicine
feats.description: You can use Nature instead of Medicine to Treat Wounds when you are in the wilderness.

feats.name: No Cause for Alarm
feats.description: You attempt to reduce panic. Attempt a @Check[diplomacy] check, comparing it to the Will DC of creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] around you who are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]. Each of them is temporarily immune for 1 h…

feats.name: Oddity Identification
feats.description: You have a knack for identifying unusual creatures. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Recall Knowledge about aberrations, astral creatures, and rare creatures.

feats.name: Pickpocket
feats.description: You can Steal or Palm an Object that is closely guarded without the Ã¢â‚¬â€œ5 penalty, and observers take a Ã¢â‚¬â€œ2 circumstance penalty to notice.

feats.name: Pilgrim's Token
feats.description: You carry a small token of protection from a site holy to your faith.

feats.name: Prepare Elemental Medicine
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin You diagnose your patient, then prepare and administer a dose of elemental medicine to a creature.
prerequisites: trained in Crafting, Herbalism Lore, or Medicine

feats.name: Quick Coercion
feats.description: You can Coerce a creature in a single round instead of the usual 1 minute.

feats.name: Quick Identification
feats.description: You can Identify Magic in 1 minute instead of 10 minutes. At master proficiency, as a 3-action activity.
prerequisites: Trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Quick Jump
feats.description: You can High Jump and Long Jump as a single action instead of 2 actions. If you do, you don't perform the initial Stride.

feats.name: Quick Repair
feats.description: You can Repair an item in 10 minutes instead of 1 hour. At master proficiency, in 1 minute.

feats.name: Ravening's Desperation
feats.description: Your study of the Beast of Gluttondark has taught you how to make do in the most trying of circumstances rather than succumb to weakness.

feats.name: Read Lips
feats.description: You can read lips of others nearby who you can clearly see.

feats.name: Read Psychometric Resonance
feats.description: With a touch, you can read the psychic impressions left on objects by their previous owners.

feats.name: Recognize Spell
feats.description: When a creature casts a spell within line of sight, you can use a reaction to attempt to identify it using the relevant skill (Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion).
prerequisites: Trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Reveal True Name
feats.description: You attempt to get a creature to do as you wish by threatening them with your knowledge of their true name.
prerequisites: trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Risky Surgery
feats.description: Your surgery can bring a patient back from the brink of death, but might push them over the edge.

feats.name: Robust Recovery
feats.description: You learned to recover faster. Your patients gain a +2 circumstance bonus when you Treat Disease. On a critical success, the target is immune to the disease for 48 hours.

feats.name: Root Magic
feats.description: Your talismans ward against foul magic. During your daily preparations, you can assemble a small pouch with bits of herbs, hair, sacred oils, and other ritual ingredients, which you give to one ally; the ally cannot be yourself. The first time that day the al…

feats.name: Schooled in Secrets
feats.description: You notice the signs and symbols that members of mystery cults and other secret societies use to declare their affiliation to fellow members.

feats.name: Seasoned
feats.description: You've mastered the preparation of many types of food and drink.
prerequisites: trained in Alcohol Lore, Cooking Lore, or Crafting

feats.name: Secret Speech
feats.description: Choose a secret society (such as the Lacunafex or the Bellflower Network).

feats.name: Sign Language
feats.description: You know how to use sign language. You learn the sign language for Common and one other language you know.

feats.name: Skill Training
feats.description: Become trained in a skill of your choice.

feats.name: Snare Crafting
feats.description: You can use the Craft activity to create snares. You gain the formulas for four common snares of 1st level or lower.

feats.name: Specialty Crafting
feats.description: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to Craft items of a specific type (alchemy, artistry, clothing, etc.).

feats.name: Speedrun Strats
feats.description: Whenever you take a move action to Stride, you can attempt a @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] check to roll forward.

feats.name: Steady Balance
feats.description: You can move across narrow surfaces and uneven ground more easily. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on checks to Balance and treat successes as critical successes.

feats.name: Stifle Flames
feats.description: Your forestry experience helped you develop techniques for fighting wildfires.

feats.name: Stitch Flesh
feats.description: You can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Treat Wounds] to restore Hit Points to undead creatures, not just living ones.

feats.name: Streetwise
feats.description: You know how to navigate cities. You can use Society to Gather Information in familiar settlements and to Recall Knowledge about local culture.

feats.name: Student of the Canon
feats.description: You've studied religious texts thoroughly. Critical failures on Religion checks to Decipher Writing or Recall Knowledge about religions become failures instead.

feats.name: Subtle Theft
feats.description: When you use Steal a target distracted by a Create a Diversion action, you can use Stealth instead of Thievery to do so.

feats.name: Survey Wildlife
feats.description: You can spend 10 minutes Surveying Wildlife to identify what creatures are nearby. You attempt a Survival check against a DC set by the GM.

feats.name: Tame Animal
feats.description: Animals born and raised far from humanoid settlements rarely get along with two-legged beings, whom they assume to be dangerous predators.

feats.name: Terrain Expertise
feats.description: Choose a terrain type (aquatic, arctic, desert, forest, mountain, plains, sky, swamp, or underground). You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Survival checks in that terrain.

feats.name: Terrain Stalker
feats.description: Choose a type of difficult terrain (rubble, snow, or underbrush). When moving through that terrain, you don't trigger reactions triggered by your movement.

feats.name: Titan Wrestler
feats.description: You can Grapple, Shove, and Trip creatures up to two sizes larger than you.

feats.name: Train Animal
feats.description: You spend time teaching an animal to do a certain action. You can teach the animal a trick by spending days training and succeeding at a Nature check.

feats.name: Trick Magic Item
feats.description: You can attempt to activate a magic item you normally can't use by attempting a check with the relevant skill (Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion).
prerequisites: Trained in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Underwater Marauder
feats.description: You've learned techniques for fighting underwater. You no longer have the flat check penalty for melee attacks underwater and don't suffer the usual movement penalties.

feats.name: Vicious Critique
feats.description: Trigger You are about to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Coerce] a merchant or crafter.

feats.name: Virtuosic Performer
feats.description: You have exceptional talent with one type of performance. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Performance checks for that type (singing, instruments, dance, etc.).

feats.name: Armored Stealth
feats.description: You have learned techniques to adjust and modify your armor and movements to reduce the noise you make.

feats.name: Assured Identification
feats.description: You rarely misidentify an item. When using Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion checks to Identify Magic, if you roll a critical failure, you get a failure instead. If you would misidentify a cursed item because you roll a success but not a critical success…
prerequisites: expert in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Aura Sight
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You've learned how to read the natural auras of other living creatures.

feats.name: Automatic Knowledge
feats.description: You know basic facts off the top of your head.
prerequisites: expert in a skill with the recall knowledge action

feats.name: Automatic Writing
feats.description: Frequency once per day When confronted with the unknown, you can receive knowledge beyond your own experience via written messages delivered by your hand.

feats.name: Backup Disguise
feats.description: You have a specific disguise that you keep at the ready, worn underneath your outer garment.

feats.name: Battle Planner
feats.description: You are constantly drawing up plans and battle scenarios, assembling strategies and gathered intelligence for later use.

feats.name: Bonded Animal
feats.description: You forge strong connections with animals.

feats.name: Chromotherapy
feats.description: You firmly believe in the technique of strengthening one's life force, spiritual energies, and bodily fluids through the application of colored light.

feats.name: Communal Crafting
feats.description: You can have other PCs help you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Craft] an item, under your direction.

feats.name: Cooperative Crafting
feats.description: You've learned to make the most of working with others on your crafting projects, a must when working with the various guilds of Highhelm.

feats.name: Criminal Connections
feats.description: You have dealings with a variety of unsavory characters, which you can leverage to trade favors or meet powerful people.

feats.name: Discreet Inquiry
feats.description: You are subtle in your efforts to learn the things you need to know.

feats.name: Distracting Performance
feats.description: Your performances are especially distracting, allowing your allies to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak] away with ease.

feats.name: Encouraging Words
feats.description: Requirements The target ally lost Stamina Points within the last round.

feats.name: Energy Fortification
feats.description: Access Minkai or Forest of Spirits origin You learn Minkaian traditions about the void and know how to manipulate the five elements to fortify vitality and void energies in the body.

feats.name: Exhort the Faithful
feats.description: Your knowledge of the tenets of your faith gives you insight into the best ways to get others of your faith to help you or to follow your directions.

feats.name: Eye of the Arclords
feats.description: Frequency once per day Access You are a member of the Arclords of Nex.

feats.name: Eyes of the City
feats.description: You can track down targets with the help of locals.

feats.name: Fleeing Diversion
feats.description: You are quick to capitalize on your distractions.

feats.name: Glad-Hand
feats.description: You can Make an Impression using Diplomacy on a creature you've just met, as part of your first interaction, and the check takes no additional time.

feats.name: Godless Healing
feats.description: You recover an additional 5 Hit Points from a successful attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Treat Wounds]{Treat your Wounds} or use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Battle Medicine] on you.

feats.name: Half-Truths
feats.description: You are able to weave your words in such a way that you never use actual lies, but still mislead people to certain conclusions.

feats.name: Intimidating Prowess
feats.description: Add your STR modifier as a circumstance bonus to Demoralize checks.

feats.name: Juggle
feats.description: You can Juggle items and still use your hands between tosses.

feats.name: Lasting Coercion
feats.description: When you successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Coerce] someone, the maximum time they comply increases to a week, still determined by the GM. If you're legendary, the maximum increases to a month.

feats.name: Leverage Connections
feats.description: You know the right people who can get things done for you in certain circles.

feats.name: Magical Crafting
feats.description: You can Craft magic items. You gain the basic formulas for four common magic items of 2nd level or lower.

feats.name: Magical Shorthand
feats.description: Learning spells comes easily to you. When you succeed at Learning a Spell, it takes 10 minutes regardless of the spell's rank. If you would succeed on the check, you critically succeed instead. If you fail, you can try again after a week or after you gain a l…
prerequisites: expert in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Mortal Healing
feats.description: You grant greater healing when the gods don't interfere.
prerequisites: You follow the Laws of Mortality

feats.name: Nimble Crawl
feats.description: You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Crawl] incredibly swiftly—up to half your Speed, rather than 5 feet.

feats.name: Pei Zing Adept
feats.description: Access Tian Xia origin You're practiced at timing preparations to the point where you can treat multiple patients at once.
prerequisites: expert in Crafting, Herbalism Lore, or Medicine

feats.name: Performer's Treatment
feats.description: With your experience as a performer, you can keep a set of medical tools handy at all times.

feats.name: Powerful Leap
feats.description: When you Leap, you can jump 5 feet farther horizontally, or 2 feet farther vertically. When you make a Long Jump, the distance is not limited by your Speed.

feats.name: Predict Weather
feats.description: By observing often subtle indicators in the environment, you may try to predict the day's weather.

feats.name: Quick Contacts
feats.description: You know where to go, who to talk to, and how to make new connections, fast.

feats.name: Quick Disguise
feats.description: You can set up a disguise in one-tenth the usual time (generally 1 minute).

feats.name: Quick Squeeze
feats.description: You can Squeeze through tight spaces at 10 feet per round (or 15 feet on a critical success). You treat successes as critical successes.

feats.name: Quiet Allies
feats.description: You're skilled at moving with a group. When you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Avoid Notice]{Avoiding Notice} and your allies @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Follow the Expert], you and those allies can roll a single Stealth check, using th…

feats.name: Rapid Mantel
feats.description: You can pull yourself up onto a ledge quickly. When you Grab an Edge, you can immediately pull yourself up as a free action.

feats.name: Rolling Landing
feats.description: You land with quick rolls that help you keep your momentum.

feats.name: Sanctify Water
feats.description: You imbue water with your deity's blessing.
prerequisites: must worship a deity that lists "holy" or "unholy" in their sanctification

feats.name: Shadow Mark
feats.description: You have learned special tricks that help you follow individuals without them noticing you.

feats.name: Shameless Request
feats.description: When you make an outrageous Request, you reduce the DC increase by 2, or even more if you're legendary.

feats.name: Slippery Prey
feats.description: You're able to escape bonds more easily than others.

feats.name: Sow Rumor
feats.description: You spread rumors, which may or may not be true, about a specific subject.

feats.name: Spirit Speaker
feats.description: You know that when an animal dies, its spirit lingers briefly before moving on.

feats.name: Tattoo Artist
feats.description: You can craft tattoos, including magical tattoos.

feats.name: Terrifying Resistance
feats.description: The spells of those you have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Demoralize] are less effective on you. If you succeed in Demoralizing a creature, for the next 24 hours you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against that creature's spells.

feats.name: Triumphant Boast
feats.description: You relate a loud and impressive tale of your triumph over a formidable foe.

feats.name: Tumbling Teamwork
feats.description: Your tumbling distracts a foe enough to create an advantage for one of your allies.

feats.name: Tweak Appearances
feats.description: You spend 1 minute making quick adjustments to someone's clothing and appearance, causing their words to carry more weight with an audience of your choice.

feats.name: Underground Network
feats.description: You're connected to groups that know what's going on in the streets, and you can get information out of them quickly.

feats.name: Unmistakable Lore
feats.description: You never get information about your areas of expertise wrong.

feats.name: Unusual Treatment
feats.description: Your medical training extends to less obvious conditions.

feats.name: Vasodilation
feats.description: Using the power of your own blood, you encourage increased blood flow to nourish damaged tissue or stifle the flow to clot wounds or prevent the spread of poison and disease.

feats.name: Ward Medic
feats.description: You can Treat Wounds on up to two creatures at once during daily preparations. At master proficiency, up to four; at legendary, up to eight.

feats.name: Wary Disarmament
feats.description: If you trigger a device or set off a trap while disarming it, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC or saving throw against the device or trap.

feats.name: What's That up Your Sleeve
feats.description: Whether as a dealer or player, you've learned to spot cheaters.

feats.name: Wilderness Spotter
feats.description: Select one type of terrain from the following list: aquatic, arctic, desert, forest, mountain, plains, sky, swamp, or underground.

feats.name: Aurochs-Headed
feats.description: Your words and body language can subconsciously unsettle orcs, giving you an advantage when convincing them to see things your way.

feats.name: Folk Dowsing
feats.description: You can find what you're looking for using a dowsing rod or pendulum.

feats.name: Graft Technician
feats.description: You can create and implant grafts. When you select this feat, you gain the formulas for four common grafts of 3rd level or lower. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Medicine checks to implant grafts. If you're a master in Medicine, this bonus increases to +2.

feats.name: Ambush Tactics
feats.description: You've made a study of the best practices for laying ambushes in terrains you've spent time learning about, be it the best way to ambush foes or the best methods of reacting to surprise attacks in those terrains.
prerequisites: trained in Lore about a specific terrain

feats.name: Confabulator
feats.description: You are skilled at weaving lies that build on one another. You reduce the penalty for Lying repeatedly from Ã¢â‚¬â€œ4 to Ã¢â‚¬â€œ2, or eliminate it at master proficiency.

feats.name: Efficient Explorer
feats.description: You are more efficient at exploring uncharted territories. As long as you're in a hex that is predominantly a terrain in which you are trained in an associated Lore skill, you grant your group one additional hexploration activity.
prerequisites: trained in Lore about a specific terrain

feats.name: Fane's Escape
feats.description: Requirements You have a deck of playing cards in your possession.

feats.name: Kreighton's Cognitive Crossover
feats.description: Trigger You gain no information from a Recall Knowledge check (usually because you failed the secret check) using one of the two skills you chose for this feat.

feats.name: Lead Climber
feats.description: When you are first to Climb a surface, you can secure a path for others. Allies who follow your path gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to Climb.

feats.name: Swift Sneak
feats.description: You can Sneak at your full Speed rather than half your Speed.

feats.name: That's Not Natural!
feats.description: Your mastery at surviving in the wild has given you a sort of sixth-sense when it comes to noticing creatures that aren't part of the natural order.

feats.name: Say That Again!
feats.description: Trigger An opponent gets a critical failure when attempting to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Demoralize] you or Lie to you.

feats.name: Advanced First Aid
feats.description: You use your medical training to ameliorate sickness or assuage fears.

feats.name: Aerobatics Mastery
feats.description: You move with grace in flight and can perform amazing aerial stunts.

feats.name: Battle Cry
feats.description: When you roll initiative, you can yell a mighty battle cry and [[/act demoralize]] an observed foe as a free action.

feats.name: Battle Prayer
feats.description: Calling out to your deity, you recite scripture to harm a foe.

feats.name: Biographical Eye
feats.description: In even a brief conversation or social interaction, you pick up on subtle social and visual cues to learn a great deal about a person's origin and history.

feats.name: Bizarre Magic
feats.description: You can draw upon strange variations in your spellcasting, whether or not you can cast occult spells. The DCs to Recognize Spells you cast and Identify Magic you use increase by 5.

feats.name: Bless Tonic
feats.description: You channel vitality energy into restoratives that ward against harm.
prerequisites: deity who grants heal divine font

feats.name: Bless Toxin
feats.description: You pour void energy into toxins you create to further debilitate your targets.
prerequisites: deity who grants harm divine font

feats.name: Break Curse
feats.description: You spend 8 hours praying or performing occult rites over the target, weakening a curse's power over them.

feats.name: Consult the Spirits
feats.description: Frequency once per day You have learned rites or meditations that enable you to perceive minor, invisible spirits within a place.
prerequisites: master in Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Continual Recovery
feats.description: You can Treat Wounds on a creature again after 10 minutes instead of waiting 1 hour.

feats.name: Disturbing Knowledge
feats.description: You utter a litany of dreadful names, prophecies, and descriptions of realms beyond mortal comprehension, drawn from your study of forbidden tomes and scrolls.

feats.name: Doublespeak
feats.description: You can deliver a secret message embedded in your normal conversation that only your allies understand, without observers noticing.

feats.name: Entourage
feats.description: You have a small group of admirers who tend to follow you around while you're in civilized settlements.

feats.name: Environmental Guide
feats.description: You can rapidly adapt to climates and help others do the same.

feats.name: Evangelize
feats.description: You point out a detail that incontrovertibly supports your faith, causing a listener's mind to whirl.
prerequisites: follower of a specific religion or philosophy

feats.name: Foil Senses
feats.description: You can hide from creatures with unusual senses. You are not automatically detected by creatures using imprecise senses such as scent or tremorsense.

feats.name: Go with the Flow
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger A creature detects your attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Impersonate], and you're within 30 feet of at least one other creature.

feats.name: Impeccable Crafter
feats.description: You produce flawless work. When you Craft an item, you treat your result as one step better than normal for determining the item's quality.

feats.name: Impeccable Crafting
feats.description: You craft flawless creations with great efficiency. Whenever you roll a success at a Crafting check to make an item of the type you chose with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Specialty Crafting], you get a critical success instead.

feats.name: Inflame Crowd
feats.description: Your performances are a call to action for the crowds who listen to you.

feats.name: Influence Nature
feats.description: With patience and time, you can make bird calls, leave game trails, and ultimately influence the behavior of a certain type of animals in the region to favor and even aid you in the days to come.

feats.name: Inventor
feats.description: You are an experienced inventor. You can attempt to create new item formulas using the Craft skill with a DC determined by the GM.

feats.name: Kip Up
feats.description: You can stand up from prone as a free action without triggering reactions.

feats.name: Master of Apprentice
feats.description: Teaching is a difficult art form, but you've gotten a pretty good handle on it.
prerequisites: master in Crafting, Performance, or a Lore skill

feats.name: Monster Crafting
feats.description: You can use the parts of monsters to aid in crafting.

feats.name: Morphic Manipulation
feats.description: You've attuned your natural aura to that of plant life, coaxing it to grow faster than normal.

feats.name: Paragon Battle Medicine
feats.description: Kassi Aziril taught you her techniques that originated the modern use of Battle Medicine.

feats.name: Planar Survival
feats.description: You can Subsist on other planes using Survival. You treat environmental conditions on other planes as one step less severe.

feats.name: Quick Climb
feats.description: When Climbing, you move at full Speed instead of half Speed. On a critical success, you move at double Speed.

feats.name: Quick Recognition
feats.description: You Recognize Spells as a free action, once per round, instead of as a reaction.
prerequisites: Master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

feats.name: Quick Setup
feats.description: If you reduce the setup time for a batch of consumables at least 6 levels lower than you to less than 1 day, you can set it up in just 2 hours (allowing you to do so during an adventuring day if you have access to your tools and materials).

feats.name: Quick Swim
feats.description: When Swimming, you move at full Speed instead of half Speed.

feats.name: Quick Unlock
feats.description: You can Pick a Lock using 1 action instead of 2.

feats.name: Rapid Affixture
feats.description: You take only 1 minute to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Affix a Talisman]. If you're legendary in Crafting, you can Affix a Talisman as a 3-action activity.

feats.name: Sacred Defense
feats.description: Frequency once per hour You call upon your deity to grant you their protective blessing.

feats.name: Scare to Death
feats.description: You attempt an Intimidation check against a creature's Will DC. On a critical success, the creature is so frightened it may die (living creatures make a Fortitude save or drop to 0 HP).

feats.name: Signature Crafting
feats.description: Magic items you create bear a stamp specific to your handiwork.

feats.name: Skeptic's Defense
feats.description: Frequency once per day Trigger You are targeted by or are in the area of a mental spell or effect.

feats.name: Slippery Secrets
feats.description: You elude magical attempts to uncover your true nature. Divination magic that would reveal your alignment, identity, or nature must succeed against your Deception DC.

feats.name: Talent Envy
feats.description: You give off a bedazzling glow with every performance, sparking feelings of severe envy and inadequacy in those who compare their talent to yours.

feats.name: Temperature Adjustment
feats.description: Access Hwanggot origin You learn Hwan temperature classifications for the elements—wood and water are cold elements, while fire, earth, and metal are hot elements.
prerequisites: master in Crafting, Herbalism Lore, or Medicine

feats.name: Terrified Retreat
feats.description: When you critically succeed at Demoralizing a creature, it must flee for 1 round in addition to being frightened 2.

feats.name: Tumbling Theft
feats.description: You reach for an opponent's item as you move past a foe.

feats.name: Vanish Into the Land
feats.description: You're adept at using the land's natural features to find places to hide.

feats.name: Wall Jump
feats.description: You can push off a wall to jump again. If you are adjacent to a wall at the end of a jump, you can immediately attempt another jump off the wall.

feats.name: Water Sprint
feats.description: Experience and training have taught you that water has just enough surface tension for a master sprinter to traverse the surface.

feats.name: Calm and Centered
feats.description: Your occult connection to the world helps you deal with being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied].

feats.name: Comforting Presence
feats.description: Trigger An adjacent ally becomes frightened or stupefied.

feats.name: Too Angry to Die
feats.description: Trigger you stand up from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] after waking up from being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] You refuse to yield the battle, even after you've been knocked off your feet and nearly killed.

feats.name: Cloud Jump
feats.description: Your unparalleled athletic skill allows you to jump impossible distances.

feats.name: Craft Anything
feats.description: You can find ways to craft just about anything, despite restrictions.

feats.name: Divine Guidance
feats.description: You're so immersed in divine scripture that you find meaning and guidance for any situation in your texts.

feats.name: Legendary Codebreaker
feats.description: Your skill with codes is so great you can break them almost instantly. You can Decipher Writing with a 1-minute activity instead of the usual time.

feats.name: Legendary Guide
feats.description: You know the wilderness so well that you can help your party travel through it with ease.

feats.name: Legendary Linguist
feats.description: You are so skilled with languages that you can communicate with any creature. You can improvise communication with creatures even if they don't share a language with you.

feats.name: Legendary Medic
feats.description: You can remove conditions with 1 hour of medical treatment. You can remove disease, blinded, deafened, doomed, and drained conditions from a willing creature.

feats.name: Legendary Negotiation
feats.description: You can negotiate with almost anyone. You can attempt to Make an Impression on even hostile creatures, and on a success you can Request a cease-fire.

feats.name: Legendary Performer
feats.description: Your fame has spread throughout the lands. You can Earn Income using Performance at a level much higher than usual, and gain renown wherever you go.

feats.name: Legendary Professional
feats.description: Your reputation in your profession is unmatched. You can Earn Income at a level far exceeding your actual level using Lore.

feats.name: Legendary Sneak
feats.description: You are always considered to be hidden from creatures that would need to see you to detect you, even if you haven't taken any actions to hide.

feats.name: Legendary Survivalist
feats.description: You can survive indefinitely without food, water, or shelter, and can endure even extreme environments like volcanoes or the deep ocean.

feats.name: Legendary Tattoo Artist
feats.description: Your craftsmanship at decorating flesh is unparalleled.

feats.name: Legendary Thief
feats.description: Your ability to Steal is almost supernatural. You can steal actively worn items and attempt seemingly impossible thefts.

feats.name: Reveal Machinations
feats.description: You reveal that you played a minor but recurring role in another humanoid's life-or at least convince them that's the case.

feats.name: Unified Theory
feats.description: You can use Arcana in place of any other magical tradition's skill (Nature, Occultism, or Religion) for all purposes.
